28900.title: The Effect of Principal Reduction on Household Distress: Evidence from Mortgage Cramdown
28900.zh_title: 本金减免对家庭困境的影响：来自抵押贷款减记的证据
28900.authors: Jacelly C. Cespedes, Carlos R. Parra, Clemens Sialm
28900.abstract: Mortgage cramdown enabled bankruptcy judges to discharge the underwater portion of a mortgage during Chapter 13 bankruptcy before the Supreme Court disallowed this practice in 1993. We exploit the random assignment of cases to judges to quantify the ex-post effects of Chapter 13 bankruptcy over the period from 1989 to 1993. We find that a successful Chapter 13 filing in a cramdown court substantially decreases the five-year foreclosure rate, the propensity to move, and the crime rate. Our results suggest that principal write-down considerably reduces homeowner’s distress.
28900.zh_abstract: 抵押贷款减记允许破产法官在第十三章破产程序中免除抵押贷款的资不抵债部分，直到最高法院在1993年禁止这种做法。我们利用案件随机分配给法官的情况，量化了1989年至1993年期间第十三章破产的事后效应。我们发现，在减记法院成功提交第十三章破产申请显著降低了五年内的止赎率、搬家倾向和犯罪率。我们的结果表明，本金减记大大减少了房主的困境。
28900.meta: Programs：AP, CF, PE；JEL：G21, G28, G41, G51, H31, H73, K25, K35

28923.title: Five Facts about the UIP Premium
28923.zh_title: 关于未抵补利率平价溢价的五个事实
28923.abstract: We introduce a new measure of currency risk for emerging markets, the UIP premium, and highlight five key insights into its cross-sectional and time-series properties. We derive the UIP premium from survey data on exchange rate expectations and show that it captures a substantial local risk factor, as evidenced by: (1) The UIP premium for emerging markets is consistently positive, higher, and more volatile than the UIP premium for advanced economies; (2) A significant portion of cross-sectional and time-series variation in the UIP premium is driven by local risk factors; (3) The interest rate differential component of the UIP premium is more volatile and strongly correlated with local risk factors; (4) Local and global risk factors influence exchange rate expectations, which closely align with actual exchange rate movements; (5) The local risk factor is associated with country-specific policy shocks, where such policy uncertainty can predict persistent expectations of depreciations.
28923.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一种衡量新兴市场货币风险的新指标——未抵补利率平价溢价，并强调了其横截面和时间序列特性的五个关键见解。我们从汇率预期的调查数据中推导出未抵补利率平价溢价，并表明它捕捉了一个重要的本地风险因子，证据如下：（1）新兴市场的未抵补利率平价溢价持续为正，且比发达经济体的未抵补利率平价溢价更高、更波动；（2）未抵补利率平价溢价的横截面和时间序列变动的很大一部分由本地风险因子驱动；（3）未抵补利率平价溢价的利差组成部分更波动，且与本地风险因子强相关；（4）本地和全球风险因子影响汇率预期，而汇率预期与实际汇率变动紧密一致；（5）本地风险因子与国家特定的政策冲击相关，这种政策不确定性可以预测持续的贬值预期。

28922.title: The Dynamics of Inattention in the (Baseball) Field
28922.authors: James E. Archsmith, Anthony Heyes, Matthew J. Neidell, Bhaven N. Sampat
28922.abstract: Recent theoretical and empirical work characterizes attention as a limited resource that decision-makers strategically allocate. There has been less research on the dynamic interdependence of attention: how paying attention now may affect performance later. In this paper, we exploit high-frequency data on decision-making by Major League Baseball umpires to examine this. We find that umpires not only apply greater effort to higher-stakes decisions, but also that effort applied to earlier decisions increases errors later. These findings are consistent with the umpire having a depletable ‘budget’ of attention. There is no such dynamic interdependence after breaks during the game (at the end of each inning) suggesting that even short rest periods can replenish attention budgets. We also find that an expectation of higher stakes future decisions leads to reduced attention to current decisions, consistent with forward-looking behavior by umpires aware of attention scarcity.
28922.zh_abstract: 近期的理论和实证工作将注意力描述为一种决策者战略性分配的有限资源。关于注意力的动态相互依赖性——即现在如何分配注意力可能影响后续表现——的研究较少。在本文中，我们利用美国职业棒球大联盟裁判决策的高频数据来检验这一点。我们发现，裁判不仅对更高风险的决策投入更多努力，而且对早期决策投入的努力会增加后续的错误。这些发现与裁判拥有一个可耗尽的注意力“预算”是一致的。在比赛期间（每局结束后）的休息之后，不存在这种动态相互依赖性，这表明即使是短暂的休息也能补充注意力预算。我们还发现，对未来更高风险决策的预期会导致对当前决策的注意力减少，这与裁判意识到注意力稀缺并具有前瞻性行为是一致的。

28921.title: What Does Codetermination Do?
28921.zh_title: 共同决定制度有何作用？
28921.authors: Simon Jäger, Shakked Noy, Benjamin Schoefer
28921.abstract: We provide a comprehensive overview of codetermination, i.e., worker representation in firms’ governance and management. The available micro evidence points to zero or small positive effects of codetermination on worker and firm outcomes, and leaves room for moderate positive effects on productivity, wages, and job stability. Similarly, we present new country-level, general-equilibrium event studies of codetermination reforms between the 1960s and 2010s, finding no effects on aggregate economic outcomes or the quality of industrial relations. We offer three explanations of the institution’s limited impact. First, existing codetermination laws convey little authority to workers. Second, countries with codetermination laws have high baseline levels of informal worker voice. Third, codetermination laws may interact with other labor market institutions, such as union representation and collective bargaining. We close by discussing implications for recent codetermination proposals in the United States.
28921.zh_abstract: 我们提供了关于共同决定制度（即工人参与公司治理和管理）的全面概述。现有的微观证据表明，共同决定制度对工人和企业结果的影响为零或微小的正向效应，并且为生产率、工资和工作稳定性的适度正向效应留有余地。同样，我们提出了关于1960年代至2010年代共同决定制度改革的新国家层面一般均衡事件研究，发现其对总体经济结果或劳资关系质量没有影响。我们对该制度有限影响提供了三种解释。首先，现有的共同决定法律赋予工人的权力很小。其次，有共同决定法律的国家具有较高水平的非正式工人发言权。第三，共同决定法律可能与其他劳动力市场制度（如工会代表和集体谈判）相互作用。最后，我们讨论了近期美国共同决定提案的启示。
28921.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：J08, K31, M1, M5

28920.title: Tasks, Automation, and the Rise in US Wage Inequality
28920.zh_title: 任务、自动化与美国工资不平等加剧
28920.abstract: We document that between 50% and 70% of changes in the US wage structure over the last four decades are accounted for by the relative wage declines of worker groups specialized in routine tasks in industries experiencing rapid automation. We develop a conceptual framework where tasks across a number of industries are allocated to different types of labor and capital. Automation technologies expand the set of tasks performed by capital, displacing certain worker groups from employment opportunities for which they have comparative advantage. This framework yields a simple equation linking wage changes of a demographic group to the task displacement it experiences. We report robust evidence in favor of this relationship and show that regression models incorporating task displacement explain much of the changes in education differentials between 1980 and 2016. Our task displacement variable captures the effects of automation technologies (and to a lesser degree offshoring) rather than those of rising market power, markups or deunionization, which themselves do not appear to play a major role in US wage inequality. We also propose a methodology for evaluating the full general equilibrium effects of task displacement (which include induced changes in industry composition and ripple effects as tasks are reallocated across different groups). Our quantitative evaluation based on this methodology explains how major changes in wage inequality can go hand-in-hand with modest productivity gains.
28920.zh_abstract: 我们证明，在过去四十年中，美国工资结构变化的50%至70%可由那些在经历快速自动化的行业中专门从事常规任务的工人群体的相对工资下降来解释。我们开发了一个概念框架，其中多个行业的任务被分配给不同类型的劳动力和资本。自动化技术扩展了资本执行的任务集，取代了某些工人群体，使其失去具有比较优势的就业机会。该框架产生了一个简单的方程，将人口群体的工资变化与其经历的任务替代联系起来。我们报告了支持这一关系的稳健证据，并表明包含任务替代变量的回归模型解释了1980年至2016年间教育差异的大部分变化。我们的任务替代变量捕捉了自动化技术（以及在较小程度上离岸外包）的影响，而非市场力量、加成率或去工会化的影响，后者本身似乎并未在美国工资不平等中发挥主要作用。我们还提出了一种评估任务替代完全一般均衡效应的方法（其中包括行业构成的诱导变化以及任务在不同群体间重新分配时的涟漪效应）。基于该方法的定量评估解释了工资不平等的重大变化如何能与适度的生产率增长并存。

28919.title: The Effect of Changes in Social Security's Delayed Retirement Credit: Evidence from Administrative Data
28919.zh_title: 社会保障延迟退休积分变化的影响：来自行政数据的证据
28919.authors: Mark Duggan, Irena Dushi, Sookyo Jeong, Gina Li
28919.abstract: The delayed retirement credit (DRC) increases monthly OASI (Old Age and Survivors Insurance) benefits for primary beneficiaries who claim after their full retirement age (FRA). For many years, the DRC was set at 3.0 percent per year (0.25 percent monthly). The 1983 amendments to Social Security more than doubled this actuarial adjustment to 8.0 percent per year. These changes were phased in gradually, so that those born in 1924 or earlier retained a 3.0 percent DRC while those born in 1943 or later had an 8.0 percent DRC. In this paper, we use administrative data from the Social Security Administration (SSA) to estimate the effect of this policy change on individual claiming behavior. We focus on the first half of the DRC increase (from 3.0 to 5.5 percent) given changes in other SSA policies that coincided with the later increases. Our findings demonstrate that the increase in the DRC led to a significant increase in delayed claiming of social security benefits and strongly suggest that the effects were larger for those with higher lifetime incomes, who would have a greater financial incentive to delay given their longer life expectancies.
28919.zh_abstract: 延迟退休积分（DRC）会提高在完全退休年龄（FRA）之后申领的主要受益人的月度老年和遗属保险（OASI）福利。多年来，DRC设定为每年3.0%（每月0.25%）。1983年社会保障修正案将这一精算调整幅度提高了一倍以上，达到每年8.0%。这些变化是逐步实施的，因此1924年或之前出生的人保留3.0%的DRC，而1943年或之后出生的人则享有8.0%的DRC。在本文中，我们使用社会保障管理局（SSA）的行政数据来估计这一政策变化对个人申领行为的影响。鉴于其他SSA政策的变化与后来的增长同时发生，我们重点关注DRC增长的前半部分（从3.0%到5.5%）。我们的研究结果表明，DRC的提高导致社会保障福利延迟申领显著增加，并强烈表明，对于终身收入较高的人，其影响更大，因为他们的预期寿命更长，延迟申领的经济激励也更大。

28918.title: Culture and the Family
28918.abstract: This handbook chapter focuses on interactions between the family and culture that have significant economic implications. We start by documenting the wide range of global variation in family institutions and discussing some of the profound changes in family structure in the modern era. We next discuss the family’s role in generating economic outcomes given that it is the main transmitter of culture, focusing on female labor force participation, fertility, and human capital investment. We review the persistent effects of different traditional family institutions and describe how cultural practices related to the family, such as son preference, co-residence traditions, polygyny, and marriage payments, affect decision-making within the family and interact with policy. Lastly we examine how diverse forces, including new policies and technologies, have led family institutions and culture to change. We conclude that studying the family in a vacuum, without accounting for the role of culture, may lead to misleading conclusions regarding the effects of diverse shocks and policies, including technological change.
28918.zh_abstract: 本手册章节聚焦于家庭与文化之间具有重要经济影响的相互作用。我们首先记录了全球范围内家庭制度的广泛差异，并讨论了现代时期家庭结构的一些深刻变化。接着，我们探讨了家庭在产生经济结果中的作用，因为它是文化的主要传递者，重点关注女性劳动力参与、生育率和人力资本投资。我们回顾了不同传统家庭制度的持续影响，并描述了与家庭相关的文化实践，如重男轻女、同居传统、一夫多妻制和婚姻支付，如何影响家庭内部的决策并与政策相互作用。最后，我们考察了包括新政策和技术在内的多种力量如何导致家庭制度和文化发生变化。我们得出结论，如果忽视文化的作用而孤立地研究家庭，可能会导致关于各种冲击和政策（包括技术变革）影响的误导性结论。
28918.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS；JEL：I0, J11, J12, J13, J14, J16, O11, O12

28917.title: It Ain’t Where You’re From, It’s Where You’re At: Hiring Origins, Firm Heterogeneity, and Wages.
28917.zh_title: 关键不在于你来自哪里，而在于你身在何处：雇佣来源、企业异质性与工资
28917.authors: Sabrina L. Di Addario, Patrick M. Kline, Raffaele Saggio, Mikkel Sølvsten
28917.abstract: Sequential auction models of labor market competition predict that the wages required to successfully poach a worker from a rival employer will depend on the productivities of both the poached and poaching ﬁrms. We develop a theoretically grounded extension of the two-way ﬁxed eﬀects model of Abowd et al. (1999) in which log hiring wages are comprised of a worker ﬁxed eﬀect, a ﬁxed eﬀect for the “destination” ﬁrm hiring the worker, and a ﬁxed eﬀect for the “origin” ﬁrm, or labor market state, from which the worker was hired. This speciﬁcation is shown to nest the reduced form for hiring wages delivered by semi-parametric formulations of the canonical sequential auction model of Postel-Vinay and Robin (2002b) and its generalization in Bagger et al. (2014). Fitting the model to Italian social security records, origin eﬀects are found to explain only 0.7% of the variance of hiring wages among job movers, while destination eﬀects explain more than 23% of the variance. Across ﬁrms, destination eﬀects are more than 13 times as variable as origin eﬀects. Interpreted through the lens of Bagger et al. (2014)’s model, this ﬁnding requires that workers possess implausibly strong bargaining strength. Studying a cohort of workers entering the Italian labor market in 2005, we ﬁnd that diﬀerences in origin eﬀects yield essentially no contribution to the evolution of the gender gap in hiring wages, while diﬀerences in destination eﬀects explain the majority of the gap at the time of labor market entry. These results suggest that where a worker is hired from tends to be relatively inconsequential for their wages in comparison to where they are currently employed.
28917.zh_abstract: 劳动力市场竞争的序贯拍卖模型预测，成功从竞争对手那里挖走一名工人所需的工资将取决于被挖走工人所在企业和挖人企业的生产率。我们开发了一个基于理论的扩展模型，该模型基于Abowd等人（1999）的双向固定效应模型，其中对数雇佣工资由工人固定效应、雇佣工人的“目的地”企业固定效应以及工人被雇佣时的“来源”企业或劳动力市场状态的固定效应组成。该设定被证明包含了由Postel-Vinay和Robin（2002b）的经典序贯拍卖模型的半参数公式及其在Bagger等人（2014）中的推广所导出的雇佣工资简化形式。将该模型应用于意大利社会保障记录，发现来源效应仅解释了工作转换者雇佣工资变异的0.7%，而目的地效应解释了超过23%的变异。在企业层面，目的地效应的变异是来源效应的13倍以上。通过Bagger等人（2014）模型的视角解释，这一发现要求工人拥有难以置信的强大议价能力。通过研究2005年进入意大利劳动力市场的一批工人，我们发现来源效应的差异对雇佣工资性别差距的演变几乎没有贡献，而目的地效应的差异则解释了劳动力市场进入时的大部分差距。这些结果表明，与工人当前受雇的地点相比，他们被雇佣的来源地对工资的影响相对较小。
28917.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C1, J3, J5

28916.title: Can Competitiveness predict Education and Labor Market Outcomes? Evidence from Incentivized Choice and Survey Measures
28916.zh_title: 竞争力能否预测教育和劳动力市场结果？来自激励性选择和调查测量的证据
28916.authors: Thomas Buser, Muriel Niederle, Hessel Oosterbeek
28916.abstract: We assess the predictive power of two measures of competitiveness for education and labor market outcomes using a large, representative survey panel. The first is incentivized and is an online adaptation of the laboratory-based Niederle-Vesterlund measure. The second is an unincentivized survey question eliciting general competitiveness on an 11-point scale. Both measures are strong and consistent predictors of income, occupation, completed level of education and field of study. The predictive power of the new unincentivized measure for these outcomes is robust to controlling for other traits, including risk attitudes, confidence and the Big Five personality traits. For most outcomes, the predictive power of competitiveness exceeds that of the other traits. Gender differences in competitiveness can explain 5-10 percent of the observed gender differences in education and labor market outcomes.
28916.zh_abstract: 我们使用一个大型、具有代表性的调查面板，评估了两种竞争力测量对教育和劳动力市场结果的预测能力。第一种是激励性的，是基于实验室的Niederle-Vesterlund测量的在线改编版。第二种是非激励性的调查问题，在11分量表上引出一般竞争力。这两种测量都是收入、职业、完成的教育水平和研究领域的强有力且一致的预测指标。新的非激励性测量对这些结果的预测能力在控制其他特质（包括风险态度、信心和大五人格特质）后依然稳健。对于大多数结果，竞争力的预测能力超过了其他特质。竞争力方面的性别差异可以解释观察到的教育和劳动力市场结果中性别差异的5%至10%。

28915.title: Crisis Innovation Policy from World War II to COVID-19
28915.zh_title: 从二战到新冠疫情的危机创新政策
28915.authors: Daniel P. Gross, Bhaven N. Sampat
28915.abstract: Innovation policy can be a crucial component of governments' responses to crises. Because speed is a paramount objective, crisis innovation may also require different policy tools than innovation policy in non-crisis times, raising distinct questions and tradeoffs. In this paper, we survey the U.S. policy response to two crises where innovation was crucial to a resolution: World War II and the COVID-19 pandemic. After providing an overview of the main elements of each of these efforts, we discuss how they compare, and to what degree their differences reflect the nature of the central innovation policy problems and the maturity of the U.S. innovation system. We then explore four key tradeoffs for crisis innovation policy—top-down vs. bottom-up priority setting, concentrated vs. distributed funding, patent policy, and managing disruptions to the innovation system—and provide a logic for policy choices. Finally, we describe the longer-run impacts of the World War II effort and use these lessons to speculate on the potential long-run effects of the COVID-19 crisis on innovation policy and the innovation system.
28915.zh_abstract: 创新政策可以成为政府应对危机的关键组成部分。由于速度是首要目标，危机创新可能还需要与非危机时期的创新政策不同的政策工具，从而引发独特的问题和权衡。在本文中，我们调查了美国在两次危机中的政策响应，在这两次危机中，创新对解决问题至关重要：第二次世界大战和新冠疫情。在概述了这些努力的主要要素之后，我们讨论了它们之间的比较，以及它们的差异在多大程度上反映了核心创新政策问题的性质和美国创新体系的成熟度。然后，我们探讨了危机创新政策的四个关键权衡——自上而下与自下而上的优先级设定、集中与分散的资金、专利政策以及管理对创新体系的干扰——并为政策选择提供了逻辑依据。最后，我们描述了二战努力的长期影响，并利用这些经验教训来推测新冠疫情危机对创新政策和创新体系的潜在长期影响。
28915.meta: Programs：DAE, EH, PE, PR；JEL：H12, H56, I18, N42, N72, O31, O32, O38

28914.title: Shocks, Institutions and Secular Changes in Employment of Older Individuals
28914.zh_title: 冲击、制度与老年人就业的长期变化
28914.abstract: Employment rates of males aged 55-64 have changed dramatically in the OECD over the last 5 decades. The average employment rate decreased by more than 15 percentage points between the mid-1970s and the mid-1990s, only to increase by roughly the same amount subsequently. One proposed explanation in the literature is that spousal non-working times are complements and that older males are working longer as a result of secular increases in labor supply of older females. In the first part of this paper we present evidence against this explanation. We then offer a new narrative to understand the employment rate changes for older individuals. We argue that the dramatic U-shaped pattern for older male employment rates should be understood as reflecting a mean reverting low frequency shock to labor market opportunities for all workers in combination with temporary country specific policy responses that incentivized older individuals to withdraw from market work.
28914.zh_abstract: 在过去50年中，经合组织国家55-64岁男性的就业率发生了巨大变化。平均就业率从1970年代中期到1990年代中期下降了超过15个百分点，随后又大致上升了相同的幅度。文献中提出的一种解释是，配偶的非工作时间是互补的，并且老年男性工作时间延长是老年女性劳动力供给长期增加的结果。在本文的第一部分，我们提出了反对这一解释的证据。然后，我们提出了一种新的叙述来理解老年人就业率的变化。我们认为，老年男性就业率的戏剧性U型模式应被理解为反映了所有工人劳动力市场机会的均值回归低频冲击，以及各国为激励老年人退出市场工作而采取的临时性特定政策响应。

28913.title: The Impact of a Private Supplement to Public Health Care: The Mexico Diabetes Experiment
28913.zh_title: 私人补充公共医疗保健的影响：墨西哥糖尿病实验
28913.authors: Ari Bronsoler, Jonathan Gruber, Enrique Seira
28913.abstract: There are ongoing debates around the world over the value of private supplements to public health insurance systems. We investigate this issue in the context of one of the world’s deadliest diseases, diabetes, and one of the countries with the worst diabetes problems in the world, Mexico. We implement a novel deniers randomization approach to cost-effectively provide a causal estimate of enrollment in private supplement to the free public health system. Our final sample of more than 1000 diabetics randomized into a large price subsidy for enrollment in the private plan is well balanced. We estimate enormous impacts of the private supplement, with HbA1c blood sugar levels falling by a full point (relative to a control mean of 8.5%), and to increase the share of those treated who are under control by 69%. We show that this effect arises through both improved treatment compliance and health behaviors, and that diabetes complications fall even in the short run. The net costs of this intervention are at most one-third of the gross costs due to offsetting public sector savings, and the health benefits are many multiples of gross costs. But the returns to private care do not appear to reflect more productive delivery of care per visit, which is comparable in a separate quasi-experimental analysis of public insurance; rather, effects arise through more attachment to medical care in the private alternative.
28913.zh_abstract: 关于私人补充公共医疗保险体系的价值，世界各地一直存在争论。我们在世界上最致命的疾病之一——糖尿病，以及世界上糖尿病问题最严重的国家之一——墨西哥的背景下研究这个问题。我们采用一种新颖的拒绝者随机化方法，以成本效益高的方式提供加入免费公共卫生系统私人补充计划的因果估计。我们的最终样本包括超过1000名糖尿病患者，他们被随机分配到加入私人计划的大幅价格补贴中，样本平衡良好。我们估计了私人补充计划的巨大影响，HbA1c血糖水平下降了整整一个百分点（相对于对照组均值8.5%），并且使接受治疗者中病情得到控制的比例增加了69%。我们表明，这种效应是通过改善治疗依从性和健康行为产生的，并且即使在短期内，糖尿病并发症也有所减少。由于公共部门的储蓄抵消，这项干预措施的净成本最多仅为总成本的三分之一，而健康效益是总成本的许多倍。但私人护理的回报似乎并不反映每次就诊时护理服务的更高生产率（在单独的公共保险准实验分析中，生产率相当）；相反，效应是通过私人替代方案中与医疗护理更强的联系而产生的。
28913.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H11, H51, I11

28912.title: Entrepreneurship During the COVID-19 Pandemic: Evidence from the Business Formation Statistics
28912.zh_title: 新冠疫情时期的创业活动：来自企业成立统计数据的证据
28912.abstract: Applications for new businesses from the U.S. Census Bureau’s monthly and weekly Business Formation Statistics (BFS) fell substantially in the early stages of the pandemic but then surged in the second half of 2020. This surge has continued through May 2021. The pace of applications since mid-2020 is the highest on record (earliest data available is 2004). The large increase in applications is for both likely new employers and nonemployers. These patterns contrast sharply with those in the Great Recession when applications for likely new employer businesses and in turn actual startups of employer businesses declined sharply and persistently. The surge in new business applications has been uneven across sectors. Ten 3-digit NAICS industries account for 75% of the surge. Dominant industries include Nonstore Retail (alone accounting for 33% of the surge), Professional, Scientific and Technical Services, Truck Transportation, and Accommodation and Food Services. Given that existing small businesses in Retail Trade and Accommodation and Food Services have suffered especially large declines in the pandemic, these patterns are consistent with restructuring induced by the pandemic.
28912.zh_abstract: 来自美国人口普查局月度和周度企业成立统计数据（BFS）的新企业申请在疫情初期大幅下降，但在2020年下半年激增。这一激增一直持续到2021年5月。自2020年中期以来的申请速度是有记录以来的最高水平（最早可得数据为2004年）。申请量的大幅增长既包括可能的新雇主企业，也包括非雇主企业。这些模式与大衰退时期形成了鲜明对比，当时可能的新雇主企业申请以及随之而来的实际雇主企业初创数量急剧且持续下降。新企业申请的激增在各行业之间分布不均。十个三位数NAICS行业占激增总量的75%。主导行业包括非店铺零售（仅此一项就占激增总量的33%）、专业、科学和技术服务、卡车运输以及住宿和餐饮服务。鉴于零售贸易以及住宿和餐饮服务业的现有小企业在疫情中遭受了特别严重的下降，这些模式与疫情引发的结构调整是一致的。

28911.title: Redesigning the US Army’s Branching Process: A Case Study in Minimalist Market Design
28911.zh_title: 重新设计美国陆军的分支流程：一个极简市场设计的案例研究
28911.authors: Kyle Greenberg, Parag A. Pathak, Tayfun Sönmez
28911.abstract: We present the proof-of-concept for minimalist market design (Sönmez, 2023) as an effective methodology to enhance an institution based on the desiderata of stakeholders with minimal interference. Four objectives – respecting merit, increasing retention, aligning talent, and enhancing trust – guided reforms to US Army’s centralized branching process of cadets to military specialties since 2006. USMA’s mechanism for the Class of 2020 exacerbated challenges implementing these objectives. Formulating the Army’s desiderata as rigorous axioms, we analyze their implications. Under our minimalist approach to institution redesign, the Army’s objectives uniquely identify a branching mechanism. Our design is now adopted at USMA and ROTC.
28911.zh_abstract: 我们展示了极简市场设计（Sönmez, 2023）作为一种有效方法的概念验证，该方法基于利益相关者的期望以最小干预来改进制度。自2006年以来，四个目标——尊重功绩、提高留任率、匹配人才和增强信任——指导了美国陆军将学员集中分配到军事专业的分支流程改革。西点军校针对2020届学员的机制加剧了实现这些目标的挑战。我们将陆军的期望形式化为严格的公理，并分析其含义。在我们的制度重新设计的极简方法下，陆军的目标唯一地确定了一个分支机制。我们的设计现已被西点军校和后备军官训练团采用。

28910.title: Granular Corporate Hedging Under Dominant Currency
28910.zh_title: 主导货币下的微观企业对冲
28910.authors: Laura Alfaro, Mauricio Calani, Liliana Varela
28910.abstract: This paper shows that, in a world dominated by vehicle currencies, ﬁrms engaging in international operations retain currency risk and hedge it real and ﬁnancially. We employ a unique dataset covering the universe of trade credit, international trade, foreign currency debt, and FX derivatives contracts with ﬁrms’ census data in Chile (2005-2018). We document that operational hedging is quantitatively limited, as diﬀerent maturity, frequency, and amount of FX operations make it diﬃcult to net these exposures. The granular ﬁrms complement real hedging using FX ﬁnancial instruments, which improve their cash ﬂow management and promote their trade and growth.
28910.zh_abstract: 本文表明，在一个由载体货币主导的世界中，从事国际业务的企业保留货币风险，并通过实际和金融手段进行对冲。我们使用一个独特的数据集，涵盖了智利（2005-2018年）企业普查数据中的贸易信贷、国际贸易、外币债务和外汇衍生品合约的总体情况。我们记录到，由于外汇操作在期限、频率和金额上的差异使得净敞口难以抵消，实际对冲在数量上是有限的。微观企业利用外汇金融工具补充实际对冲，这改善了它们的现金流管理，并促进了它们的贸易和增长。
28910.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ITI；JEL：F31, F38, G30, G38

28909.title: Illegal Immigration: The Trump Effect
28909.abstract: Recent years have witnessed the emergence of increasingly provocative anti-immigrant politicians in both Europe and the United States. We examine whether the 2016 election of Donald Trump, who made illegal immigration and border enforcement a centerpiece of his campaign, reduced illegal immigration into the U.S. We exploit the fact the election result was widely unexpected and thus generated a large, overnight change in expected immigration policy and rhetoric. We compare migration flows before and after the election and find that while it reduced immigration among deported Mexicans and at least temporarily among Central Americans, it had no effect on the overall inflow of unauthorized Mexican workers.
28909.zh_abstract: 近年来，欧洲和美国都出现了越来越具有挑衅性的反移民政客。我们考察了2016年唐纳德·特朗普的当选（他将非法移民和边境执法作为其竞选的核心议题）是否减少了进入美国的非法移民。我们利用了选举结果普遍出乎意料这一事实，从而导致了预期移民政策和言论在一夜之间发生巨大变化。我们比较了选举前后的移民流动，发现虽然选举减少了被驱逐出境的墨西哥人以及至少暂时减少了中美洲人的移民，但对未经授权的墨西哥工人的总体流入没有影响。

28908.title: Competition Laws, Governance, and Firm Value
28908.zh_title: 竞争法、治理与企业价值
28908.authors: Ross Levine, Chen Lin, Wensi Xie
28908.abstract: Do antitrust laws influence corporate valuations? We evaluate the relationship between firm value and laws limiting firms from engaging in anticompetitive agreements, abusing dominant positions, and conducting M&As that restrict competition. Using firm-level data from 99 countries over the 1990-2010 period, we discover that valuations rise after countries strengthen competition laws. The effects are larger among firms with more severe pre-existing agency problems: firms in countries with weaker investor protection laws, with weaker firm-specific governance provisions, and with greater opacity. The results suggest that antitrust laws that intensify competition exert a positive influence on valuations by reducing agency problems.
28908.zh_abstract: 反垄断法是否影响企业估值？我们评估了企业价值与限制企业从事反竞争协议、滥用市场支配地位以及进行限制竞争的并购的法律之间的关系。使用1990-2010年期间99个国家的企业层面数据，我们发现，在各国加强竞争法后，企业估值上升。这种效应在事前代理问题更严重的企业中更大：这些企业位于投资者保护法律较弱的国家，具有较弱的公司特定治理条款，并且透明度较低。结果表明，加强竞争的竞争法通过减少代理问题对企业估值产生积极影响。
28908.meta: Programs：CF, IFM, IO, LE；JEL：G3, K21, K22, L4

28907.title: Central Bank Policy and the Concentration of Risk: Empirical Estimates
28907.zh_title: 中央银行政策与风险集中：实证估计
28907.authors: Nuno Coimbra, Daisoon Kim, Hélène Rey
28907.abstract: Before the 2008 crisis, the cross-sectional skewness of banks’ leverage went up and macro risk concentrated in the balance sheets of large banks. Using a model of proﬁt-maximizing banks with heterogeneous Value-at-Risk constraints, we extract the distribution of banks’ risk-taking parameters from balance sheet data. The time series of these estimates allow us to understand systemic risk and its concentration in the banking sector over time. Counterfactual exercises show that (1) monetary policymakers confront the trade-oﬀ between stimulating the economy and ﬁnancial stability, and (2) macroprudential policies can be eﬀective tools to increase ﬁnancial stability.
28907.zh_abstract: 在2008年危机之前，银行杠杆的横截面偏度上升，宏观风险集中在大银行的资产负债表中。使用一个具有异质性风险价值约束的利润最大化银行模型，我们从资产负债表数据中提取了银行风险承担参数的分布。这些估计值的时间序列使我们能够理解系统性风险及其在银行业中随时间推移的集中程度。反事实实验表明：（1）货币政策制定者面临刺激经济与金融稳定之间的权衡；（2）宏观审慎政策可以成为增强金融稳定的有效工具。
28907.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ME；JEL：E0, E5, F3, G01

28906.title: The Anatomy of Cyber Risk
28906.authors: Rustam Jamilov, Hélène Rey, Ahmed Tahoun
28906.abstract: This paper uses computational linguistics to introduce a novel measure of firm-level cyber risk exposure based on the quarterly earnings calls of listed firms. Our measure covers more than 14,000 firms from over 90 countries between 2003 and 2025. The measure is validated using human auditors and a large language model. We show that the measure affects stock returns and profits, is priced in the options market, and predicts actual cyberattacks. Cyber risk spills over across firms and propagates from firm to sector level. Back-of-the-envelope estimates suggest that the global cost of cyber risk exposure amounts to hundreds of billions of dollars annually.
28906.zh_abstract: 本文使用计算语言学，基于上市公司季度财报电话会议，引入了一种新颖的企业层面网络风险暴露度量指标。该度量覆盖了2003年至2025年间来自90多个国家的超过14,000家企业。该度量通过人工审计员和一个大型语言模型进行了验证。我们表明，该度量影响股票回报和利润，在期权市场中被定价，并能预测实际的网络攻击。网络风险在企业间溢出，并从企业层面传播到行业层面。粗略估计表明，全球网络风险暴露的成本每年高达数千亿美元。

28905.title: Funding Risky Research
28905.authors: Chiara Franzoni, Paula Stephan, Reinhilde Veugelers
28905.abstract: The speed with which Covid-19 vaccines were developed and their high-performance underlines how much society depends on the pace of scientific research and how effective science can be. This is especially the case for vaccines based on the new designer mRNA technology. We draw on this exceptional moment for science to reflect on whether the government funding system is sufficiently supportive of research needed for key breakthroughs, and whether the system of funding encourages sufficient risk-taking to induce scientists to explore transformative research paths. We begin with a discussion of the challenges faced by scientists who did pioneering-research related to mRNA-based drugs in getting support for research. We describe measures developed to distinguish risky from non-risky research and their citation footprint. We review empirical work suggesting that funding is biased against risky research and provide a framework for thinking about why principal investigators, panelists and funding agencies may eschew risky research. We close with a discussion of interventions that government agencies and universities could follow if they wish to avoid a bias against risk.
28905.zh_abstract: 新冠疫苗的开发速度及其高性能凸显了社会对科学研究速度的依赖程度以及科学可以多么有效。对于基于新型设计信使RNA技术的疫苗尤其如此。我们利用这一科学的特殊时刻来反思：政府资助体系是否充分支持关键突破所需的研究，以及资助体系是否鼓励足够的风险承担以引导科学家探索变革性的研究路径。我们首先讨论了从事信使RNA药物相关开创性研究的科学家在获得研究支持方面所面临的挑战。我们描述了为区分高风险与非高风险研究及其引用足迹而制定的措施。我们回顾了表明资助偏向于规避高风险研究的实证工作，并提供了一个框架来思考为什么首席研究员、评审小组成员和资助机构可能回避高风险研究。最后，我们讨论了如果政府机构和大学希望避免对风险的偏见，它们可以采取的干预措施。

28904.title: Trade Policy is Real News: Theory and Evidence
28904.zh_title: 贸易政策是真实新闻：理论与证据
28904.authors: George A. Alessandria, Carter B. Mix
28904.abstract: We evaluate the aggregate effects of changes in trade barriers when these changes can be implemented slowly over time and trade responds gradually to changes in trade barriers because firm-level trade costs make exporting a dynamic decision. Our model shows how expectations of changes in trade barriers affect the economy. We find that while decreases in trade barriers increase economic activity, expectations of lower future trade barriers temporarily decrease investment, hours worked, and output. Further-more, canceling an expected decline in future trade barriers raises investment and output in the short run but substantially lowers medium-run growth. These effects are larger when the expected reform is bigger. In the data, we find that countries with more trade growth after the General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade (GATT) rounds decreased investment and hours worked in the years leading to the tariff cuts, as predicted by our model.
28904.zh_abstract: 我们评估了贸易壁垒变化的总体效应，当这些变化可能随时间缓慢实施，并且由于企业层面的贸易成本使出口成为一个动态决策，贸易对贸易壁垒变化做出渐进反应时。我们的模型展示了贸易壁垒变化的预期如何影响经济。我们发现，虽然贸易壁垒的降低增加了经济活动，但对未来贸易壁垒降低的预期会暂时减少投资、工作时间和产出。此外，取消预期的未来贸易壁垒降低会在短期内提高投资和产出，但会大幅降低中期增长。当预期改革规模更大时，这些效应也更大。在数据中，我们发现，在关税与贸易总协定（GATT）回合后贸易增长更多的国家，在关税削减前的几年里投资和工作时间有所减少，这与我们模型的预测一致。

28903.title: Equilibrium Effects of Pay Transparency
28903.zh_title: 薪酬透明度的均衡效应
28903.abstract: The public discourse around pay transparency has focused on the direct effect: how workers seek to rectify pay inequities through renegotiation. The question of how wage-setting and employment practices of the firm respond has received less attention. To study these equilibrium outcomes, we test our model of bargaining under incomplete information with an analysis of pay transparency mandates in the context of the U.S. private sector. Our model predicts that transparency reduces the individual bargaining power of workers, leading to lower average wages. A key insight is that employers credibly refuse to pay high wages to any one worker to avoid costly renegotiations with others under transparency. In situations where workers do not have individual bargaining power, such as under a collective bargaining agreement or in markets with posted wages, greater transparency has a muted impact on average wages. We test these predictions by evaluating the adoption of U.S. state legislation protecting the right of workers to inquire about the salaries of their coworkers. Consistent with our prediction, the laws lead wages to decline by approximately 2% overall, but effects are muted when workers have low individual bargaining power. Our model provides a unified framework to analyze a wide range of transparency policies, and reconciles effects of transparency mandates documented in a variety of countries and contexts.
28903.zh_abstract: 关于薪酬透明度的公共讨论主要集中在直接效应上：即工人如何通过重新谈判来纠正薪酬不平等。而企业的工资设定和雇佣实践如何响应这一问题受到的关注较少。为了研究这些均衡结果，我们基于不完全信息下的谈判模型进行了检验，并结合对美国私营部门薪酬透明度强制规定的分析。我们的模型预测，透明度会削弱工人的个人议价能力，导致平均工资下降。一个关键见解是，雇主可信地拒绝向任何一名工人支付高工资，以避免在透明度下与其他工人进行代价高昂的重新谈判。在工人没有个人议价能力的情况下，例如在集体谈判协议下或公布工资的市场中，更高的透明度对平均工资的影响较小。我们通过评估美国州立法保护工人询问同事工资的权利的采用情况来检验这些预测。与我们的预测一致，这些法律导致工资总体下降约2%，但当工人个人议价能力较低时，影响较小。我们的模型提供了一个统一框架来分析广泛的透明度政策，并调和了在不同国家和背景下记录的透明度强制规定的效应。

28902.title: Using the Retail Distribution of Sellers to Impute Expenditures Shares
28902.zh_title: 利用卖方的零售分布推算支出份额
28902.authors: Alexis Antoniades, Robert C. Feenstra, Mingzhi Xu
28902.abstract: Many price indices must be constructed without quantity data at the elementary level. We show that for some consumer goods in the United States and other countries, one can approximate expenditure shares using weights derived from the retail distribution of sellers. These weights are based on the share of outlets selling an item, or the share of outlets adjusted by the total number of items sold in each. Relative to using no weights, we find that using such imputed weights substantially reduces bias in the frequency of price changes, in annual inflation, and in price comparisons across countries.\n
28902.zh_abstract: 许多价格指数必须在缺乏基层数量数据的情况下构建。我们表明，对于美国和其他国家的一些消费品，可以使用基于卖方零售分布推导的权重来近似支出份额。这些权重基于销售某商品的店铺比例，或根据每家店铺销售的商品总数调整后的店铺比例。与不使用权重相比，我们发现使用此类推算权重显著减少了价格变动频率、年通胀率以及跨国价格比较中的偏差。

28901.title: Personal Bankruptcy and the Accumulation of Shadow Debt
28901.zh_title: 个人破产与影子债务的积累
28901.authors: Bronson Argyle, Benjamin Iverson, Taylor D. Nadauld, Christopher Palmer
28901.abstract: Compiling new liability-level data from the balance sheets of personal bankruptcy filers, we document that a sizable share of reported liabilities are “shadow debt,” debt not reported to credit bureaus that often arises from the non-payment of goods and services. We use this new data to evaluate how debtor cash flows affect when consumers file for bankruptcy and how much debt they have at bankruptcy. We find that filers respond to a quasi-exogenous $\$100$ increase in monthly cash flows by delaying filing by an average of one month and by increasing unsecured indebtedness by $\$4,000$ in the months preceding filing. A large share of the additional debt incurred by delaying filers is shadow debt, and our effects are concentrated among filers without employment, health, or marriage shocks.
28901.zh_abstract: 通过汇编个人破产申请者资产负债表上新的负债层面数据，我们记录了报告负债中有相当大一部分是“影子债务”，即未向信用机构报告且通常源于商品和服务未付款的债务。我们利用这些新数据来评估债务人现金流如何影响消费者何时申请破产以及破产时的债务规模。我们发现，申请者对每月现金流准外生增加100美元的反应是，平均延迟申请一个月，并在申请前几个月内增加4000美元的无担保债务。延迟申请者所承担的额外债务中很大一部分是影子债务，并且我们的效应集中在没有就业、健康或婚姻冲击的申请者中。

28945.title: Trade and Innovation
28945.authors: Marc J. Melitz, Stephen J. Redding
28945.abstract: Two central insights from the Schumpeterian approach to innovation and growth are that the pace of innovation is endogenously determined by the expectation of future profits and that growth is inherently a process of creative destruction. As international trade is a key determinant of firm profitability and survival, it is natural to expect it to play a key role in shaping both incentives to innovate and the rate of creative destruction. In this paper, we review the theoretical and empirical literature on trade and innovation. We highlight four key mechanisms through which international trade affects endogenous innovation and growth: (i) market size; (ii) competition; (iii) comparative advantage; (iv) knowledge spillovers. Each of these mechanisms offers a potential source of dynamic welfare gains in addition to the static welfare gains from trade from conventional trade theory. Recent research has suggested that these dynamic welfare gains from trade can be substantial relative to their static counterparts. Discriminating between alternative mechanisms for these dynamic welfare gains and strengthening the evidence on their quantitative magnitude remain exciting areas of ongoing research.
28945.zh_abstract: 熊彼特式创新与增长方法的两个核心见解是：创新速度由对未来利润的预期内生决定，以及增长本质上是一个创造性破坏的过程。由于国际贸易是企业盈利能力和生存的关键决定因素，自然可以预期它在塑造创新激励和创造性破坏速度方面发挥关键作用。在本文中，我们回顾了关于贸易与创新的理论和实证文献。我们强调了国际贸易影响内生创新和增长的四个关键机制：（i）市场规模；（ii）竞争；（iii）比较优势；（iv）知识溢出。除了传统贸易理论中来自贸易的静态福利收益之外，这些机制中的每一个都提供了动态福利收益的潜在来源。最近的研究表明，这些来自贸易的动态福利收益相对于其静态对应物可能是巨大的。区分这些动态福利收益的替代机制，并加强关于其数量规模的证据，仍然是正在进行的研究中令人兴奋的领域。

28944.title: Heterogeneity in the Impact of Privatizing Social Health Insurance: Evidence from California's Medicaid Program
28944.zh_title: 社会健康保险私有化影响的异质性：来自加州医疗补助计划的证据
28944.authors: Mark Duggan, Craig Garthwaite, Adelina Yanyue Wang
28944.abstract: State governments face the classic “make or buy” decision for the provision of Medicaid services. Over the past two decades, the majority of states have outsourced the provision of social health insurance through Medicaid Managed Care (MMC) programs. These programs have been extensively studied in the literature – with little evidence of large positive or negative effects. However, most states initially allowed older and sicker enrollees to remain enrolled in the government run fee for service (FFS) programs. It is possible that these more fragile enrollees could have a different experience in managed care. In this paper we study California’s mandatory enrollment of the senior and persons with disabilities (SPD) population in MMC. We find this mandatory enrollment caused an increased use of the emergency department and transfers between hospitals. This was not simply a hassle cost for enrollees – we also estimate an increase in mortality for the affected population. These effects were strongest for the sickest enrollees – the types of enrollees that might be expected to have a different experience with managed care. Our results suggest the adverse impact of MMC varies by the enrollee health, which should inform the optimal outsourcing decision for governments.
28944.zh_abstract: 州政府在提供医疗补助服务方面面临着经典的“制造或购买”决策。在过去二十年中，大多数州已将社会健康保险的提供外包给医疗补助管理式护理计划。这些计划在文献中得到了广泛研究——几乎没有证据表明存在大的正面或负面影响。然而，大多数州最初允许年龄较大和病情较重的参保者继续参加政府运营的按服务收费计划。这些更脆弱的参保者在管理式护理中可能会有不同的体验。在本文中，我们研究了加州强制将老年人和残疾人群体纳入管理式护理的情况。我们发现，这种强制参保导致急诊科使用和医院间转诊增加。这不仅仅是参保者的麻烦成本——我们还估计受影响人群的死亡率有所上升。这些影响对病情最重的参保者最为强烈——这类参保者可能预期在管理式护理中有不同的体验。我们的结果表明，管理式护理的不利影响因参保者健康状况而异，这应为政府的最优外包决策提供信息。
28944.meta: Programs：EH, PE；JEL：H0, H1, I1, I10, I13, I18

28943.title: The Role of Information in the Rosen-Roback Framework
28943.zh_title: 信息在罗森-罗巴克框架中的作用
28943.authors: Xuwen Gao, Ran Song, Christopher Timmins
28943.abstract: In this paper, we study the role of information in non-market valuation. We develop a variant of the Rosen-Roback model of inter-urban sorting that incorporates public access to information about air quality, and demonstrate that information constraints create a wedge between the revealed and true hedonic prices. Moreover, the direction and the magnitude of that wedge depends on the individual’s perception bias. We empirically test our theoretical predictions by leveraging a natural experiment – the unexpected disclosure of PM2.5 data in China. We find that perception bias before the data disclosure leads to a downward estimation bias in hedonic valuation. The hedonic price of avoiding PM2.5 exposure increases substantially from 171 to 336 Chinese Yuan in response to the information shock. Our work sheds light on the application of Rosen-Roback theory for non-market valuation in countries where the public access to information is restricted.
28943.zh_abstract: 本文研究了信息在非市场估值中的作用。我们构建了一个罗森-罗巴克城际分类模型的变体，该模型纳入了公众获取空气质量信息的渠道，并证明信息约束会在揭示性特征价格与真实特征价格之间造成一个楔子。此外，这个楔子的方向和大小取决于个体的感知偏差。我们利用一个自然实验——中国PM2.5数据的意外公开——来实证检验我们的理论预测。我们发现，数据公开前的感知偏差导致特征价格估值出现向下估计偏差。在信息冲击下，避免PM2.5暴露的特征价格从171元人民币大幅上升至336元人民币。我们的工作揭示了罗森-罗巴克理论在公众信息获取受限国家进行非市场估值时的应用前景。

28942.title: Gender Differences in Peer Recognition by Economists
28942.zh_title: 经济学家同行认可中的性别差异
28942.authors: David Card, Stefano DellaVigna, Patricia Funk, Nagore Iriberri
28942.abstract: We study the selection of Fellows of the Econometric Society, using a new data set of publications and citations for over 40,000 actively publishing economists since the early 1900s. Conditional on achievement, we document a large negative gap in the probability that women were selected as Fellows in the 1933-1979 period. This gap became positive (though not statistically significant) from 1980 to 2010, and in the past decade has become large and highly significant, with over a 100% increase in the probability of selection for female authors relative to males with similar publications and citations. The positive boost affects highly qualified female candidates (in the top 10% of authors) with no effect for the bottom 90%. Using nomination data for the past 30 years, we find a key proximate role for the Society's Nominating Committee in this shift. Since 2012 the Committee has had an explicit mandate to nominate highly qualified women, and its nominees enjoy above-average election success (controlling for achievement). Looking beyond gender, we document similar shifts in the premium for geographic diversity: in the mid-2000s, both the Fellows and the Nominating Committee became significantly more likely to nominate and elect candidates from outside the US. Finally, we examine gender gaps in several other major awards for US economists. We show that the gaps in the probability of selection of new fellows of the American Academy of Arts and Sciences and the National Academy of Sciences closely parallel those of the Econometric Society, with historically negative penalties for women turning to positive premiums in recent years.
28942.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个包含自20世纪初以来超过40,000名活跃发表论文的经济学家的出版物和引用数据的新数据集，研究了计量经济学会会士的遴选过程。在控制学术成就的条件下，我们发现在1933年至1979年期间，女性被选为会士的概率存在巨大的负向差距。这一差距在1980年至2010年间转为正向（尽管在统计上不显著），而在过去十年中变得巨大且高度显著，与具有相似发表和引用记录的男性作者相比，女性作者被选中的概率增加了超过100%。这种正向提升仅影响高资质的女性候选人（位于作者排名前10%），而对排名后90%的作者没有影响。利用过去30年的提名数据，我们发现学会的提名委员会在这一转变中起到了关键的直接作用。自2012年以来，该委员会被明确授权提名高资质的女性，并且其提名人在选举中享有高于平均水平的成功率（在控制学术成就后）。超越性别视角，我们记录了地理多样性溢价的类似转变：在21世纪中期，会士和提名委员会都显著更倾向于提名和选举来自美国以外的候选人。最后，我们考察了美国经济学家其他几个主要奖项中的性别差距。我们表明，美国艺术与科学院和美国国家科学院新院士当选概率的差距与计量经济学会的情况高度相似，历史上对女性的负面惩罚在近年转变为正向溢价。
28942.meta: Programs：ED, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：J16

28941.title: Option-Implied Spreads and Option Risk Premia
28941.zh_title: 期权隐含利差与期权风险溢价
28941.authors: Christopher L. Culp, Mihir Gandhi, Yoshio Nozawa, Pietro Veronesi
28941.abstract: We propose implied spreads (IS) and normalized implied spreads (NIS) as simple measures to characterize option prices. IS is the credit spread of an option’s implied bond, the portfolio long a risk-free bond and short a put option. NIS normalizes IS by the risk-neutral default probability and reflects tail risk. IS and NIS are countercyclical and predict implied bond returns, while neither, like implied volatility, predicts put returns. These opposite predictability results are consistent with a stochastic volatility, stochastic jump intensity model, as put premia increase in volatility but decrease in jump intensity, while implied bond premia increase in both.
28941.zh_abstract: 我们提出隐含利差（IS）和标准化隐含利差（NIS）作为刻画期权价格的简单度量。IS是期权隐含债券（即一个由无风险债券多头和看跌期权空头组成的投资组合）的信用利差。NIS通过风险中性违约概率对IS进行标准化，并反映尾部风险。IS和NIS是逆周期的，并能预测隐含债券的收益，而两者（如同隐含波动率一样）均不能预测看跌期权的收益。这些相反的预测结果与一个具有随机波动率和随机跳跃强度的模型一致，因为看跌期权溢价随波动率增加而增加，但随跳跃强度增加而减少，而隐含债券溢价则随两者增加而增加。

28940.title: Dissecting Green Returns
28940.authors: Lubos Pastor, Robert F. Stambaugh, Lucian A. Taylor
28940.abstract: Green assets delivered high returns in recent years. This performance reflects unexpectedly strong increases in environmental concerns, not high expected returns. German green bonds outperformed their higher-yielding non-green twins as the “greenium” widened, and U.S. green stocks outperformed brown as climate concerns strengthened. Despite that outperformance, we estimate lower expected returns for green stocks than for brown, consistent with theory. We estimate expected returns in two ways: ex ante, using implied costs of capital, and ex post, using realized returns purged of shocks from climate concerns and earnings. A theoretically motivated green factor explains much of value stocks' recent underperformance.
28940.zh_abstract: 近年来绿色资产带来了高回报。这一表现反映了环境关注度出乎意料的强劲增长，而非高预期回报。随着“绿色溢价”的扩大，德国绿色债券的表现优于其收益率更高的非绿色同类债券；随着气候担忧的加剧，美国绿色股票的表现优于棕色股票。尽管存在这种优异表现，我们估计绿色股票的预期回报低于棕色股票，这与理论一致。我们通过两种方式估计预期回报：事前，使用隐含资本成本；事后，使用剔除气候担忧和盈利冲击后的已实现回报。一个基于理论动机的绿色因子解释了近期价值股表现不佳的很大一部分原因。

28939.title: Signaling and Discrimination in Collaborative Projects
28939.zh_title: 合作项目中的信号传递与歧视
28939.abstract: We study collaborative work in pairs when potential collaborators are motivated by the reputational implications of (joint or solo) projects. In equilibrium, individual collaboration strategies both influence and are influenced by the public assignment of credit for joint work across the two partners. We investigate the fragility of collaboration to small biases in the public’s credit assignment. When collaborators are symmetric, symmetric equilibria are often fragile, and in non-fragile equilibria individuals receive asymmetric collaborative credit based on payoff-irrelevant “identities.” We study payoff distributions across identities within asymmetric equilibria, and compare aggregate welfare across symmetric and asymmetric equilibria.
28939.zh_abstract: 我们研究了当潜在合作者受到（联合或单独）项目声誉影响时的成对合作工作。在均衡中，个体的合作策略既影响也受公众对联合工作中两位合作者功劳分配的影响。我们考察了合作在公众功劳分配存在微小偏差时的脆弱性。当合作者对称时，对称均衡通常是脆弱的，而在非脆弱均衡中，个体基于与收益无关的“身份”获得不对称的合作功劳。我们研究了不对称均衡中不同身份间的收益分配，并比较了对称均衡与不对称均衡中的总体福利。

28938.title: Temptation and Incentives to Wealth Accumulation
28938.zh_title: 诱惑与财富积累的激励
28938.authors: Orazio Attanasio, Agnes Kovacs, Patrick Moran
28938.abstract: We propose a rich model of household behavior to study the effect of two important policies: mortgage interest tax deduction and mandatory mortgage amortization. These policies have attracted some controversy, first because they are conceived to increase overall saving, an objective that the literature does not agree they can achieve, and second because they incentivize illiquid savings and may thus increase the share of ‘wealthy hand-to-mouth’ households. We build a life-cycle model where housing may act as a commitment device to counteract present biases arising from temptation. We show that the model matches several empirical facts, including the large share of wealthy hand-to-mouth households. We evaluate the effect of the two policies and find that they increase wealth accumulation by 7 and 10% respectively. Our results demonstrate that these policies not only induce portfolio re-balancing, as emphasized by the previous literature, but also increase savings by making commitment more accessible.
28938.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个丰富的家庭行为模型，以研究两项重要政策的效果：抵押贷款利息税收减免和强制性抵押贷款摊销。这些政策引发了一些争议，首先是因为它们旨在增加总体储蓄，而文献对此目标能否实现存在分歧；其次是因为它们激励非流动性储蓄，从而可能增加“富裕的月光族”家庭的比例。我们构建了一个生命周期模型，其中住房可能作为一种承诺机制，以抵消由诱惑引起的现时偏差。我们证明该模型符合若干实证事实，包括“富裕的月光族”家庭占比较高。我们评估了这两项政策的效果，发现它们分别使财富积累增加了7%和10%。我们的结果表明，这些政策不仅如先前文献所强调的那样诱导了投资组合再平衡，而且通过使承诺更容易获得而增加了储蓄。
28938.meta: Programs：EFG, PE；JEL：D11, D14, D91, E21, R21

28937.title: The Impact of Free Secondary Education: Experimental Evidence from Ghana
28937.zh_title: 免费中等教育的影响：来自加纳的实验证据
28937.authors: Esther Duflo, Pascaline Dupas, Michael Kremer
28937.abstract: Following the widespread adoption of free primary education, African policymakers are now considering making secondary school free, but little is known about the private and social benefits of free secondary education. We exploit randomized assignment to secondary school scholarships among 2,064 youths in Ghana, combined with 12 years of data, to establish that scholarships increase educational attainment, knowledge, skills, and preventative health behaviors, while reducing female fertility. Eleven years after receipt of the scholarship, only female winners show private labor market gains, but those come primarily in the form of better access to jobs with rents (in particular rationed jobs in the public sector). We develop a simple model to interpret the labor market results and help think through the welfare impact of free secondary education.
28937.zh_abstract: 在免费初等教育被广泛采纳之后，非洲政策制定者现在正在考虑使中等教育免费，但关于免费中等教育的私人和社会收益知之甚少。我们利用对加纳2,064名青年随机分配中等教育奖学金的机会，结合12年的数据，证实奖学金提高了教育程度、知识、技能和预防性健康行为，同时降低了女性生育率。在获得奖学金十一年后，只有女性获奖者在私人劳动力市场上显示出收益，但这些收益主要来自获得带有租金的工作机会（特别是公共部门中的配给制工作岗位）。我们构建了一个简单模型来解释劳动力市场结果，并帮助思考免费中等教育的福利影响。

28936.title: Digital Addiction
28936.authors: Hunt Allcott, Matthew Gentzkow, Lena Song
28936.abstract: Many have argued that digital technologies such as smartphones and social media are addictive. We develop an economic model of digital addiction and estimate it using a randomized experiment. Temporary incentives to reduce social media use have persistent effects, suggesting social media are habit forming. Allowing people to set limits on their future screen time substantially reduces use, suggesting self-control problems. Additional evidence suggests people are inattentive to habit formation and partially unaware of self-control problems. Looking at these facts through the lens of our model suggests that self-control problems cause 31 percent of social media use.
28936.zh_abstract: 许多人认为智能手机和社交媒体等数字技术具有成瘾性。我们开发了一个数字成瘾的经济模型，并通过一项随机实验对其进行估计。减少社交媒体使用的临时激励具有持续性影响，这表明社交媒体具有习惯形成性。允许人们为未来的屏幕使用时间设定限制会显著减少使用，这表明存在自我控制问题。额外的证据表明，人们对习惯形成不够关注，并且部分地没有意识到自我控制问题。通过我们模型的视角审视这些事实表明，自我控制问题导致了31%的社交媒体使用。
28936.meta: Programs：IO, PE；JEL：D12, D61, D90, D91, I31, L86, O33

28935.title: Explaining the Income and Consumption Effects of COVID in India
28935.zh_title: 解释印度COVID-19的收入与消费效应
28935.authors: Arpit Gupta, Anup Malani, Bartek Woda
28935.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic led to stark reductions in economic activity in India. We employ CMIE's Consumer Pyramids Household Survey to examine the timing, distribution, and mechanism of the impacts from this shock on income and consumption through December 2020. First, we estimate large and heterogeneous drops in income, with ambiguous effects on inequality. While incomes of salaried workers fell 35%; incomes of daily laborers fell 75%. At the same time, we observe that income fell more for individuals from households in the highest income quartile. Second, we document an increase in effort to buffer income shocks by switching occupations. We employ a Roy Model to estimate the gains from occupation churn and find, surprisingly, that reservation wages fell, implying that the risk of COVID did not reduce the value of employment. Third, we find that consumption fell less than income, suggesting households were able to smooth the idiosyncratic components of the COVID shock as well as they did before COVID. Finally, consumption of food and fuel fell less than consumption of durables such as clothing and appliances. Following Costa (2001) and Hamilton (2001), we estimate Engel curves and find that changes in consumption reflect large price shocks (rather than a retreat to subsistence) in sectors other than food and fuel/power. In the food sector, it appear that lockdown successfully distinguished essential and non-essential services, at least to the extent that it did not increase the relative price of food. There is some suggestive evidence that the price shocks outside the food sector were larger in places with greater COVID-19 cases, even during the lockdown.
28935.zh_abstract: COVID-19大流行导致印度经济活动急剧减少。我们利用CMIE的消费者金字塔家庭调查，考察了截至2020年12月这一冲击对收入和消费的影响时机、分布及机制。首先，我们估计了收入的大幅且异质性下降，其对不平等的影响尚不明确。虽然受薪工人的收入下降了35%，但日工的收入下降了75%。同时，我们观察到，来自最高收入四分位数家庭的个人收入下降更多。其次，我们记录了通过转换职业来缓冲收入冲击的努力有所增加。我们采用Roy模型估计职业转换的收益，并惊讶地发现保留工资下降了，这意味着COVID-19的风险并未降低就业的价值。第三，我们发现消费下降幅度小于收入，表明家庭能够像COVID-19之前一样平滑COVID-19冲击的特质性成分。最后，食品和燃料的消费下降幅度小于服装和电器等耐用品的消费。继Costa（2001）和Hamilton（2001）之后，我们估计了恩格尔曲线，发现消费的变化反映了除食品和燃料/电力以外的部门中巨大的价格冲击（而非退回到生存水平）。在食品部门，封锁似乎成功地区分了基本和非基本服务，至少在一定程度上没有提高食品的相对价格。有一些提示性证据表明，即使在封锁期间，COVID-19病例较多地区的食品部门以外的价格冲击也更大。

28934.title: The Role of Childcare Challenges in the US Jobs Market Recovery During the COVID-19 Pandemic
28934.zh_title: 儿童保育挑战在COVID-19大流行期间美国就业市场复苏中的作用
28934.authors: Jason Furman, Melissa Schettini Kearney, Wilson Powell
28934.abstract: We examine how much of the overall decline in employment between the beginning of 2020 and 2021 can be explained by excess job loss among parents of young children, and mothers specifically. Using data from the Current Population Survey (CPS), we confirm that, in general, mothers with young children have experienced a larger decline in employment, as compared (unconditionally) with other adults, including fathers. This excess job loss is driven by mothers without a four-year college (bachelor’s) degree. The main point of the paper is to build off this observation and examine how much of the aggregate employment deficit in early 2021 can be explained by parent-specific issues, such as childcare struggles. To examine this question, we construct counterfactual employment rates and labor force participation rates that assign to mothers of young children the percent change in employment and labor force participation rates experienced by comparable women without young children. We consider multiple definition, sample, and counterfactual specification alternatives. Our analysis yields robust evidence that differential job loss among mothers of young children accounts for a negligible share of the ongoing aggregate employment deficit. The result is even stronger (and flips signs) if we consider all parents, since fathers with young children experienced less job loss than other men. The practical implication of these findings is that nearly all of the aggregate ongoing employment deficit is explained by factors that affect workers more broadly, as opposed to challenges specific to working parents.
28934.zh_abstract: 我们考察了2020年初至2021年间总体就业下降中有多少可归因于幼儿父母（尤其是母亲）的过度失业。利用当前人口调查（CPS）数据，我们证实，总体而言，与包括父亲在内的其他成年人相比（无条件地），有幼儿的母亲经历了更大的就业下降。这种过度失业是由没有四年制大学（学士）学位的母亲驱动的。本文的主要观点是基于这一观察，并考察2021年初的总体就业赤字中有多少可由父母特有的问题（如儿童保育困境）解释。为了研究这个问题，我们构建了反事实就业率和劳动力参与率，将有幼儿的母亲赋值为无幼儿可比女性经历的就业率和劳动力参与率百分比变化。我们考虑了多种定义、样本和反事实设定替代方案。我们的分析提供了稳健的证据，表明有幼儿母亲的差异化失业在持续的总体就业赤字中所占份额微不足道。如果我们考虑所有父母，结果甚至更强（且符号翻转），因为有幼儿的父亲经历的失业少于其他男性。这些发现的实际含义是，几乎所有的总体持续就业赤字都是由更广泛影响工人的因素解释的，而非工作父母特有的挑战。

28933.title: Future Paths of Electric Vehicle Adoption in the United States: Predictable Determinants, Obstacles and Opportunities
28933.zh_title: 美国电动汽车普及的未来路径：可预测的决定因素、障碍与机遇
28933.authors: James E. Archsmith, Erich Muehlegger, David S. Rapson
28933.abstract: This paper identifies and quantifies major determinants of future electric vehicle (EV) demand in order to inform widely-held aspirations for market growth. Our model compares three channels that will affect EV market share in the United States from 2020-2035: intrinsic (no-subsidy) EV demand growth, net-of-subsidy EV cost declines (e.g. batteries), and government subsidies. Geographic variation in preferences for sedans and light trucks highlights the importance of viable EV alternatives to conventional light trucks; belief in climate change is highly correlated with EV adoption patterns; and the first $\$500$ billion in cumulative nationwide EV subsidies is associated a 7-10 percent increase in EV market share in 2035, an effect that diminishes as subsidies increase. The rate of intrinsic demand growth dwarfs the impact of demand-side subsidies and battery cost declines, highlighting the importance of non-monetary factors (e.g. charging infrastructure, product quality and/or cultural acceptance) on EV demand.
28933.zh_abstract: 本文识别并量化了未来电动汽车（EV）需求的主要决定因素，以期为广泛持有的市场增长愿望提供信息。我们的模型比较了2020-2035年间将影响美国电动汽车市场份额的三个渠道：内在（无补贴）电动汽车需求增长、补贴后电动汽车成本下降（例如电池）以及政府补贴。偏好轿车和轻型卡车的地区差异凸显了可行的电动汽车替代传统轻型卡车的重要性；对气候变化的信念与电动汽车普及模式高度相关；累计全国电动汽车补贴的前5000亿美元与2035年电动汽车市场份额增加7-10%相关，这一效应随着补贴增加而减弱。内在需求增长率远超需求侧补贴和电池成本下降的影响，凸显了非货币因素（例如充电基础设施、产品质量和/或文化接受度）对电动汽车需求的重要性。

28932.title: Spatial-SIR with Network Structure and Behavior: Lockdown Rules and the Lucas Critique
28932.zh_title: 具有网络结构和行为的空间SIR模型：封锁规则与卢卡斯批判
28932.abstract: We introduce a model of the diffusion of an epidemic with demographically heterogeneous agents interacting socially on a spatially structured network. Contagion-risk averse agents respond behaviorally to the diffusion of the infections by limiting their social interactions. Firms also respond by allowing employees to work remotely, depending on their productivity. The spatial structure induces local herd immunities along sociodemographic dimensions, which significantly affect the dynamics of infections. We study several non-pharmaceutical interventions; e.g., i) lockdown rules, which set thresholds on the spread of the infection for the closing and reopening of economic activities; and ii) selective lockdowns, which restrict social interactions by location (in the network) and by the demographic characteristics of the agents. Substantiating a “Lucas critique” argument, we assess the cost of naive discretionary policies ignoring agents and firms’ behavioral responses.
28932.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一个流行病传播模型，其中人口统计异质性的代理人在空间结构化的网络上进行社交互动。厌恶传染风险的代理人通过限制社交互动来对感染传播做出行为反应。企业也根据员工的生产力允许他们远程工作。空间结构沿着社会人口维度诱导局部群体免疫，这显著影响感染动态。我们研究了几种非药物干预措施；例如，i) 封锁规则，为经济活动的关闭和重新开放设定感染传播阈值；以及 ii) 选择性封锁，根据位置（在网络中）和代理人的人口统计特征限制社交互动。通过证实“卢卡斯批判”论点，我们评估了忽视代理人和企业行为反应的幼稚自由裁量政策的成本。

28931.title: Macro News and Micro News: Complements or Substitutes?
28931.zh_title: 宏观新闻与微观新闻：互补还是替代？
28931.abstract: We study how the arrival of macro-news affects the stock market’s ability to incorporate the information in firm-level earnings announcements. Existing theories suggest that macro and firm-level earnings news are attention substitutes; macro-news announcements crowd out firm-level attention, causing less efficient processing of firm-level earnings announcements. We find the opposite: the sensitivity of announcement returns to earnings news is 17% stronger, and post-earnings announcement drift 71% weaker, on macro-news days. This suggests a complementary relationship between macro and micro news that is consistent with either investor attention or information transmission channels.
28931.zh_abstract: 我们研究宏观新闻的到来如何影响股票市场吸收公司层面盈利公告信息的能力。现有理论表明，宏观新闻和公司层面盈利新闻是注意力替代品；宏观新闻公告挤出了对公司层面的关注，导致公司层面盈利公告的处理效率降低。我们发现相反的情况：在宏观新闻日，公告回报对盈利新闻的敏感性增强17%，盈利公告后漂移减弱71%。这表明宏观与微观新闻之间存在互补关系，这与投资者注意力或信息传递渠道一致。

28930.title: The Impact of the COVID-19 Pandemic and Policy Responses on Excess Mortality
28930.zh_title: COVID-19大流行及政策应对措施对超额死亡率的影响
28930.authors: Virat Agrawal, Jonathan H. Cantor, Neeraj Sood, Christopher M. Whaley
28930.abstract: As a way of slowing COVID-19 transmission, many countries and U.S. states implemented shelter-in-place (SIP) policies. However, the effects of SIP policies on public health are a-priori ambiguous. Using an event study approach and data from 43 countries and all U.S. states, we measure changes in excess deaths following the implementation of COVID-19 shelter-in-place (SIP) policies. We do not find that countries or U.S. states that implemented SIP policies earlier had lower excess deaths. We do not observe differences in excess deaths before and after the implementation of SIP policies, even when accounting for pre-SIP COVID-19 death rates.
28930.zh_abstract: 作为减缓COVID-19传播的一种方式，许多国家和美国各州实施了居家令（SIP）政策。然而，SIP政策对公共卫生的影响先验地是不明确的。使用事件研究方法和来自43个国家及所有美国州的数据，我们测量了实施COVID-19居家令（SIP）政策后超额死亡人数的变化。我们没有发现更早实施SIP政策的国家或美国州有更低的超额死亡人数。即使在考虑SIP前的COVID-19死亡率后，我们也没有观察到SIP政策实施前后超额死亡人数的差异。

28929.title: Doing More with Less: Predicting Primary Care Provider Effectiveness
28929.zh_title: 事半功倍：预测初级保健提供者的有效性
28929.abstract: This paper uses data from 802,777 veterans assigned to 7,548 primary care providers (PCPs) within the Veterans Health Administration (VHA) to examine variations in the efficacy of primary care providers (PCPs), their consequences for health outcomes, and their determinants. Leveraging quasi-random assignment of veterans to PCPs, we measure PCP effectiveness along three dimensions: the probability their patients have subsequent hospitalizations for ambulatory care sensitive conditions (ACSC), subsequent hospitalizations or emergency department (ED) visits for mental health conditions, or hospitalizations/ED visits for circulatory conditions. We find a significant range in these measures across PCPs. For example, a one standard deviation improvement in our measure of mental health effectiveness predicts a 0.21 percentage point (3.8%) lower risk of patient death over the next three years and 4.4% lower total costs. We also find that patients whose physicians are better according to one dimension also have better outcomes in terms of the other dimensions we consider. Finally, we find that more effective PCPs do more with less: Their patients have fewer primary care visits, referrals to specialists, lab panels or imaging tests. Effective PCPs are slightly more likely to comply with guidelines for mental health screenings, and slightly less likely to comply with guidelines for physical health screenings, but these differences in screening propensities are negligible in magnitude.
28929.zh_abstract: 本文利用退伍军人健康管理局（VHA）内分配给7,548名初级保健提供者（PCP）的802,777名退伍军人的数据，考察初级保健提供者（PCP）有效性的差异、其对健康结果的影响及其决定因素。利用退伍军人准随机分配给PCP的情况，我们从三个维度衡量PCP有效性：其患者随后因门诊敏感病症（ACSC）住院的概率、因心理健康状况住院或急诊（ED）就诊的概率，以及因循环系统疾病住院或急诊就诊的概率。我们发现这些指标在PCP之间存在显著差异。例如，我们的心理健康有效性指标每提高一个标准差，预测患者未来三年死亡风险降低0.21个百分点（3.8%），总成本降低4.4%。我们还发现，其医生在一个维度上表现更好的患者，在我们考虑的其他维度上也有更好的结果。最后，我们发现更有效的PCP事半功倍：他们的患者有更少的初级保健就诊、专科转诊、实验室检查或影像学检查。有效的PCP略更可能遵守心理健康筛查指南，略不更可能遵守身体健康筛查指南，但这些筛查倾向的差异在幅度上可以忽略不计。

28928.title: Achieving Scale Collectively
28928.authors: Vittorio Bassi, Raffaela Muoio, Tommaso Porzio, Ritwika Sen, Esau Tugume
28928.abstract: This paper argues that rental market interactions allow small firms to increase their effective scale and mechanize production, even when each individual firm would be too small to invest in expensive machines. We conduct a novel survey of manufacturing firms in Uganda, which uncovers an active rental market for large machines between small firms in informal clusters. We then build an equilibrium model of firm behavior and estimate it with our data. Our results show that the rental market is quantitatively important for mechanization and productivity since it provides a workaround for other market imperfections that keep firms small. We also show that the rental market shapes the effectiveness of policies to foster mechanization, such as subsidies to purchase machines.
28928.zh_abstract: 本文认为，租赁市场互动允许小企业增加其有效规模并实现机械化生产，即使每个单独的企业规模太小而无法投资于昂贵的机器。我们对乌干达的制造业企业进行了一项新颖的调查，揭示了非正式集群内小企业之间活跃的大型机器租赁市场。然后，我们构建了一个企业行为均衡模型，并用我们的数据对其进行估计。我们的结果表明，租赁市场对机械化和生产率在数量上很重要，因为它为其他使企业保持小规模的市场不完善提供了变通办法。我们还表明，租赁市场塑造了促进机械化政策（例如购买机器补贴）的有效性。

28927.title: Leadership and Organizations
28927.authors: Eric Alston, Lee J. Alston, Bernardo Mueller
28927.abstract: To understand leadership, it is necessary to understand the purpose of an organization. Organizations are hierarchies with leaders at the top. Why do we have leaders instead of an algorithm making decisions? The theory of the firm recognizes benefits to centralizing authority but these organizational benefits from hierarchy have not been clearly separated from the specific contributions of leaders. Leadership is the ability to successfully manage transaction costs of an organization. Prominent amongst organizational transaction costs are agency and coordination costs. The balance between these two types of costs depends on the purpose of the organization. We hypothesize that changing leaders is likely to have a larger effect within organizations with relatively lower scope or scale of purpose because of the way in which decision rights tend to be relatively concentrated in such organizations. We test our hypotheses with data on NFL coaches, and deans of business and law schools.
28927.zh_abstract: 要理解领导力，就必须理解组织的目标。组织是层级结构，领导者处于顶端。为什么我们需要领导者，而不是由算法来做决策？企业理论认识到集中权威的好处，但这些来自层级结构的组织收益尚未与领导者的具体贡献明确区分开来。领导力是成功管理组织交易成本的能力。组织交易成本中突出的是代理成本和协调成本。这两类成本之间的平衡取决于组织的目标。我们假设，在目标范围或规模相对较小的组织中，更换领导者可能产生更大的影响，因为在这些组织中，决策权往往相对集中。我们利用NFL教练以及商学院和法学院院长的数据来检验我们的假设。

28926.title: Are Stated Expectations Actual Beliefs? New Evidence for the Beliefs Channel of Investment Demand
28926.zh_title: 陈述的预期是实际信念吗？投资需求信念渠道的新证据
28926.abstract: Despite growing interest in expectation surveys, critics argue that survey responses are not reliable measures of the expectations underlying financial decisions, and empirical work often finds only a weak correlation between investment and stated beliefs. In this paper, we document a systematic gap between an individual's own forecasted returns and the beliefs used in investment decisions. In particular, perceived past housing returns predict individual real estate investment decisions even conditional on flexible controls for an individual's forecasted distribution of future home-price growth. Many respondents acknowledge that they rely on past returns more than their survey-reported expected returns when making investment decisions, ruling out simple measurement-error explanations. To interpret these findings, we present evidence that investment decision-making induces cognitively uncertain investors to rely more on belief factors in which they are relatively confident, such as their estimation of recent local housing returns. Survey respondents that rely on past returns more than their surveyed forecasts frequently cite uncertainty about other belief factors as their rationale.
28926.zh_abstract: 尽管对预期调查的兴趣日益增长，但批评者认为，调查回应并非衡量金融决策背后预期的可靠指标，且实证研究通常只发现投资与陈述信念之间存在微弱的相关性。在本文中，我们记录了个体自身预测的回报与投资决策中所用信念之间的系统性差距。具体而言，感知到的过去住房回报能够预测个人的房地产投资决策，即使在灵活控制个人对未来房价增长预测分布的情况下也是如此。许多受访者承认，在做出投资决策时，他们更依赖过去的回报，而非调查中报告的预期回报，这排除了简单的测量误差解释。为了解释这些发现，我们提供的证据表明，投资决策过程促使认知不确定的投资者更多地依赖他们相对有信心的信念因素，例如他们对近期当地住房回报的估计。那些更依赖过去回报而非调查预测的受访者，经常将其他信念因素的不确定性作为其理由。
28926.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：D84, D91, G11, R21

28925.title: The Intergenerational Mortality Tradeoff of COVID-19 Lockdown Policies
28925.zh_title: 新冠疫情封锁政策的代际死亡率权衡
28925.authors: Lin Ma, Gil Shapira, Damien de Walque, Quy-Toan Do, Jed Friedman, Andrei A. Levchenko
28925.abstract: In lower-income countries, the economic contractions that accompany lockdowns to contain the spread of COVID-19 can increase child mortality, counteracting the mortality reductions achieved by the lockdown. To formalize and quantify this effect, we build a macro-susceptible-infected-recovered model that features heterogeneous agents and a country-group-specific relationship between economic downturns and child mortality, and calibrate it to data for 85 countries across all income levels. We find that in low-income countries, a lockdown can potentially lead to 1.76 children's lives lost due to the economic contraction per COVID-19 fatality averted. The ratio stands at 0.59 and 0.06 in lower-middle and upper-middle income countries, respectively. As a result, in some countries lockdowns can actually produce net increases in mortality. In contrast, the optimal lockdown that maximizes the present value of aggregate social welfare is shorter and milder in poorer countries than in rich ones, and never produces a net mortality increase.
28925.zh_abstract: 在低收入国家，为遏制新冠疫情传播而实施的封锁所伴随的经济收缩，可能会增加儿童死亡率，从而抵消封锁所实现的死亡率降低。为了形式化和量化这一效应，我们构建了一个宏观易感-感染-恢复模型，该模型具有异质性主体，并刻画了特定国家组别的经济衰退与儿童死亡率之间的关系，并将其校准至涵盖所有收入水平的85个国家的数据。我们发现，在低收入国家，封锁每避免一例新冠死亡，可能因经济收缩导致1.76名儿童死亡。这一比率在低中等收入国家和高中等收入国家分别为0.59和0.06。因此，在某些国家，封锁实际上可能导致死亡率净增加。相比之下，在较贫穷国家，最大化社会总福利现值的优化封锁比富裕国家更短、更温和，并且从未导致死亡率净增加。

28924.title: The Psychosocial Value of Employment
28924.authors: Reshmaan N. Hussam, Erin M. Kelley, Gregory V. Lane, Fatima T. Zahra
28924.abstract: In settings where an individual’s labor choices are constrained, the inability to work may generate psychosocial harm. This paper presents a causal estimate of the psychosocial value of employment in the Rohingya refugee camps of Bangladesh. We engage 745 individuals in a field experiment with three arms: (1) a control arm, (2) a weekly cash arm, and (3) a gainful employment arm, in which work is offered and individuals are paid weekly the approximate equivalent of that in the cash arm. We find that employment confers significant psychosocial benefits beyond the impacts of cash alone, with effects concentrated among males. The cash arm does not improve psychosocial wellbeing, despite the provision of cash at a weekly amount that is more than twice the amount held by recipients in savings at baseline. Consistent with these findings, we find that 66% of those in our work treatment are willing to forego cash payments to instead work for free. Our results have implications for social protection policies for the unemployed in low income countries and refugee populations globally.
28924.zh_abstract: 在个人劳动选择受到约束的环境中，无法工作可能会产生心理社会伤害。本文提供了孟加拉国罗兴亚难民营中就业心理社会价值的因果估计。我们让745名个体参与一项包含三个组的实地实验：（1）对照组，（2）每周现金组，以及（3）有酬就业组，其中提供工作，且个人每周获得的报酬大致相当于现金组的金额。我们发现，就业带来的心理社会效益显著超过仅提供现金的影响，且效应集中在男性中。现金组并未改善心理社会福祉，尽管每周提供的现金金额是基线时受助者储蓄金额的两倍以上。与这些发现一致，我们发现，在我们的工作处理组中，66%的人愿意放弃现金报酬，转而免费工作。我们的结果对低收入国家失业者和全球难民群体的社会保护政策具有启示意义。

28975.title: What Drives Demand for State-Run Lotteries? Evidence and Welfare Implications
28975.zh_title: 州营彩票需求驱动因素：证据与福利影响
28975.authors: Benjamin Lockwood, Hunt Allcott, Dmitry Taubinsky, Afras Y. Sial
28975.abstract: We use natural experiments embedded in state-run lotteries and a new nationally representative survey to provide reduced-form and structural estimates of risk preferences and behavioral biases in lottery demand. We ﬁnd that sales respond more to the expected value of the jackpot than to price, but are unresponsive to variation in the second prize—a pattern that implies probability weighting but is inconsistent with standard parameterizations. In the survey, we ﬁnd that lottery spending decreases modestly with income and is strongly associated with measures of innumeracy, poor statistical reasoning, and other proxies for behavioral bias. These bias proxies decline with income and statistically account for 43 percent of lottery purchases, suggesting that at least some of lottery demand is due to behavioral bias, not just anticipatory utility or entertainment value. We use these empirical moments to estimate a model of socially optimal lottery design. In the model, current multi-state lottery designs increase welfare but may harm heavy spenders.
28975.zh_abstract: 我们利用州营彩票中的自然实验以及一项新的全国代表性调查，对彩票需求中的风险偏好和行为偏差提供了简化形式和结构性估计。研究发现，销售额对头奖预期价值的反应大于对价格的敏感度，但对二等奖的变化不敏感——这一模式意味着概率加权，但与标准参数化不一致。在调查中，我们发现彩票支出随收入增加而适度下降，并与计算能力不足、统计推理能力差以及其他行为偏差指标密切相关。这些偏差指标随收入增加而下降，并在统计上解释了43%的彩票购买行为，这表明至少部分彩票需求源于行为偏差，而不仅仅是预期效用或娱乐价值。我们利用这些实证矩来估计一个社会最优彩票设计模型。在该模型中，当前的多州彩票设计提高了福利，但可能损害高支出者利益。
28975.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D12, D61, D9, H21, H42, H71

28974.title: Risk Perceptions, Board Networks, and Directors’ Monitoring
28974.zh_title: 风险感知、董事会网络与董事监督
28974.authors: Wenzhi Ding, Chen Lin, Thomas Schmid, Michael S. Weisbach
28974.abstract: What makes independent directors perform their monitoring duty? One possible reason is that they are worried about being sanctioned by regulators if they do not monitor sufficiently well. Using unique features of the Chinese financial market, we estimate the extent to which independent directors’ perceptions of the likelihood of receiving a regulatory penalty affect their monitoring. Our results suggest that they are more likely to vote against management after observing how another director in their board network received a regulatory penalty related to negligence. This effect is long-lasting and stronger if the observing and penalized directors share the same professional background or gender and if the observing director is at a firm that is more likely to be penalized. These results provide direct evidence suggesting that the possibility of receiving penalties is an important factor motivating directors.
28974.zh_abstract: 是什么促使独立董事履行其监督职责？一个可能的原因是，他们担心如果监督不力会受到监管机构的处罚。利用中国金融市场的独特特征，我们估计了独立董事对受到监管处罚可能性的感知对其监督行为的影响程度。结果表明，在观察到董事会网络中另一位董事因疏忽而受到监管处罚后，他们更有可能投票反对管理层。这种影响是持久的，并且当观察董事与受罚董事具有相同职业背景或性别时，以及当观察董事所在公司更有可能受到处罚时，这种影响更强。这些结果提供了直接证据，表明受到处罚的可能性是激励董事的重要因素。

28973.title: Does It Matter How Central Banks Accumulate Reserves? Evidence from Sovereign Spreads
28973.zh_title: 央行积累储备的方式重要吗？来自主权利差的证据
28973.abstract: There has been substantial research on the benefits of accumulating foreign reserves, but less on the relative merits of how these reserves are accumulated. In this paper we explore whether the form of accumulation affects country risk. We first present a model of endogenous sovereign debt defaults, where we show that reserve accumulation through the issuance of debt contingent on local output reduces spreads in a way that reserve accumulation with foreign borrowing does not. We confirm this model prediction when taking the theory to the data. These results suggest that attention should be placed on the way reserves are accumulated, a distinction that has important practical implications. In particular, our results call into question the benefits of programs of reserves strengthening through external debt such as those typically implemented by multilateral organizations.
28973.zh_abstract: 关于积累外汇储备的好处已有大量研究，但关于这些储备积累方式的相对优劣却研究较少。本文探讨了积累形式是否会影响国家风险。我们首先提出了一个内生主权债务违约模型，在该模型中，我们表明通过发行依赖于本地产出的债务来积累储备，会以外国借款积累储备所没有的方式降低利差。在将理论应用于数据时，我们证实了这一模型预测。这些结果表明，应关注储备积累的方式，这一区别具有重要的实际意义。特别是，我们的结果对通过外部债务加强储备的计划（例如多边组织通常实施的那些计划）的好处提出了质疑。

28972.title: Women Left Behind: Gender Disparities in Utilization of Government Health Insurance in India
28972.zh_title: 被遗忘的女性：印度政府健康保险利用中的性别差异
28972.abstract: We document large gender disparities within a government program that entitles 46 million poor individuals to free hospital care. We show that care is not free in practice and higher costs are associated with larger disparities. Lowering care costs increases female utilization but does not reduce gender disparities because marginal beneficiaries are as likely to be male as inframarginals. Long-term exposure to local female leaders reduces disparities by addressing factors lowering female care. In the presence of gender bias, subsidizing social services may fail to address gender inequalities without actions that specifically target females.
28972.zh_abstract: 我们记录了一个政府项目内存在的巨大性别差异，该项目为4600万贫困人口提供免费住院治疗。我们表明，在实践中护理并非免费，更高的成本与更大的差异相关。降低护理成本会增加女性的利用率，但不会减少性别差异，因为边际受益者与边际内受益者一样可能是男性。长期接触地方女性领导者通过降低影响女性护理的因素来减少差异。在存在性别偏见的情况下，如果没有专门针对女性的行动，补贴社会服务可能无法解决性别不平等问题。
28972.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EH；JEL：I12, I13, J16, O12

28971.title: Delayed Creative Destruction: How Uncertainty Shapes Corporate Assets
28971.zh_title: 延迟的创造性破坏：不确定性如何塑造企业资产
28971.authors: Murillo Campello, Gaurav Kankanhalli, Hyunseob Kim
28971.abstract: We show how uncertainty shapes corporate asset allocation, composition, and productivity using data from the shipping industry. Firms curtail both ship acquisitions and disposals when uncertainty increases, primarily through cuts in new ship orders and ship demolitions—decisions that are costlier to reverse vis-à-vis secondary market transactions. Uncertainty also prompts firms to concentrate their fleets into narrower, less productive portfolios. We corroborate our findings using the 2009-2011 spike in Somali pirate attacks as an uncertainty shock to shipping activity. Uncertainty hampers “creative destruction,” slowing both the adoption of innovation embodied in new capital and the disposal of old capital.
28971.zh_abstract: 我们利用航运业的数据展示了不确定性如何塑造企业资产配置、构成和生产率。当不确定性增加时，企业会同时减少船舶购置和处置，主要通过削减新船订单和船舶拆解——这些决策相对于二级市场交易而言逆转成本更高。不确定性还促使企业将其船队集中到更狭窄、生产率更低的组合中。我们利用2009-2011年索马里海盗袭击事件作为航运活动的不确定性冲击，证实了我们的发现。不确定性阻碍了“创造性破坏”，既减缓了体现在新资本中的创新的采用，也减缓了旧资本的处置。

28970.title: Leverage and Cash Dynamics
28970.authors: Harry DeAngelo, Andrei S. Gonçalves, René M. Stulz
28970.abstract: This paper documents new and empirically important interactions between cash-balance and leverage dynamics. Cash ratios typically vary widely over extended horizons, with dynamics remarkably similar to (and complementary with) those of capital structure. Leverage and cash dynamics interact approximately as predicted by the internal-versus-external funding regimes in Myers and Majluf (1984). Leverage is quite volatile when cash ratios are stable and vice-versa, while net-debt ratios are almost always volatile. Most firms increase leverage sharply as cash balances (internal funds) become scarce. Capital structure models that extend Hennessy and Whited (2005) to include cash-balance dynamics explain some, but not all, aspects of the observed relation between cash squeezes and leverage increases.
28970.zh_abstract: 本文记录了现金余额与杠杆动态之间新的且实证上重要的相互作用。现金比率通常在较长时间范围内变化很大，其动态与资本结构的动态非常相似（且互补）。杠杆和现金动态的相互作用大致如Myers和Majluf（1984）中内部与外部融资机制所预测的那样。当现金比率稳定时，杠杆波动很大，反之亦然，而净债务比率几乎总是波动很大。当现金余额（内部资金）变得稀缺时，大多数公司会急剧增加杠杆。将Hennessy和Whited（2005）扩展到包括现金余额动态的资本结构模型，解释了观察到的现金紧缩与杠杆增加之间关系的一些方面，但并非全部。

28969.title: Size, Trade, Technology and the Division of Labor
28969.zh_title: 规模、贸易、技术与劳动分工
28969.abstract: We model the implications of the classical ideas that larger markets allow for a finer division of labor and this division feeds back into larger market size. Market size affects specialization due to firm-level increasing returns to scale arising from fixed costs of adopting intermediate-intensive technologies. The impacts are magnified in general equilibrium by an endogenous multiplier—due to input-output linkages in a roundabout structure—and a selection effect due to heterogeneous fundamental productivity and entry costs.
28969.zh_abstract: 我们对古典思想进行了建模，即更大的市场允许更精细的劳动分工，而这种分工又反过来促进更大的市场规模。市场规模通过企业层面的规模报酬递增影响专业化，这种规模报酬递增源于采用中间密集型技术的固定成本。在一般均衡中，这些影响通过一个内生乘数（由于循环结构中的投入产出联系）和一个由于异质性基础生产率和进入成本而产生的选择效应而被放大。
28969.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI, PR；JEL：F1, F4, L11, O24, O25, O51

28968.title: Evaluating the Role of Insurance in Managing Risk of Future Pandemics
28968.zh_title: 评估保险在管理未来大流行风险中的作用
28968.abstract: COVID-19 has demonstrated the challenges that policymakers, insurers, businesses, and employees face when disaster assistance programs are developed after the pandemic has already started. There is now an opportunity to design and implement effective and efficient solutions to manage the financial risks of a future pandemic. This paper suggests a practical framework, informed by the recent experience with COVID-19, for defining a meaningful role for insurance in managing business interruption (BI) and other risks from future pandemics. Policymakers, regulators, businesses, and other stakeholders interacting with representatives from the insurance industry can assist in defining its role in providing protection against the financial consequences of future pandemics. This framework, while designed for dealing with future pandemics, may be applied to other catastrophic and systemic risks.
