28968.zh_abstract: COVID-19已经展示了当灾难援助计划在大流行已经开始后才制定时，政策制定者、保险公司、企业和员工所面临的挑战。现在有机会设计和实施有效且高效的解决方案，以管理未来大流行的财务风险。本文基于近期COVID-19的经验，提出了一个实用框架，用于定义保险在管理未来大流行的业务中断（BI）和其他风险中的有意义角色。政策制定者、监管机构、企业以及其他与保险业代表互动的利益相关者，可以帮助定义其在提供针对未来大流行财务后果的保护方面的作用。该框架虽然是为应对未来大流行而设计的，但也可应用于其他灾难性和系统性风险。

28967.title: In Search of the Origins of Financial Fluctuations: The Inelastic Markets Hypothesis
28967.zh_title: 探寻金融波动的根源：无弹性市场假说
28967.authors: Xavier Gabaix, Ralph S. J. Koijen
28967.abstract: We develop a framework to theoretically and empirically analyze the fluctuations of the aggregate stock market. Households allocate capital to institutions, which are fairly constrained, for example operating with a mandate to maintain a fixed equity share or with moderate scope for variation in response to changing market conditions. As a result, the price elasticity of demand of the aggregate stock market is small, and flows in and out of the stock market have large impacts on prices.
28967.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个理论框架，用于从理论和实证角度分析整体股票市场的波动。家庭将资本配置给机构，这些机构受到相当严格的约束，例如，它们可能被要求维持固定的股权份额，或者根据市场条件变化进行调整的余地有限。因此，整体股票市场的需求价格弹性较小，资金流入和流出股票市场会对价格产生重大影响。
28967.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E7, G1, G32, G4

28966.title: Who Paid Los Angeles' Minimum Wage? A Side-by-Side Minimum Wage Experiment in Los Angeles County
28966.zh_title: 谁为洛杉矶的最低工资买单？洛杉矶县的一项并行最低工资实验
28966.authors: Christopher Esposito, Edward E. Leamer, Jerry Nickelsburg
28966.abstract: In the restaurant industry, the incidence of an increase in the minimum wage may fall on restaurant owners, customers, landlords, and/or employees. We analyze the first two in this study, with implications for the incidence borne by landlords and employees. We exploit a geographical discontinuity in Los Angeles County, where in 2015 the City of Los Angeles passed a minimum wage law and in 2016 the State of California passed a different minimum wage law. This created two minimum wage schedules in the county that remained unequal for over five years. Using a novel data set from a multi-year price survey, our analysis shows that the incidence of Los Angeles City’s higher minimum wage fell on customers in high-income neighborhoods, and on landlords and restaurant owners in low-income neighborhoods. We further show that the mix of responses at restaurants subject to the LA City minimum wage, including price increases, menu changes, and restaurant closures, was affected by proximity to restaurants subject to the lower California State minimum wage. The effect of neighborhood income levels and distance to lower-wage competition has important implications for designing minimum wage policies.
28966.zh_abstract: 在餐饮行业，最低工资上涨的负担可能落在餐馆老板、顾客、房东和/或员工身上。本研究分析了前两者，并对房东和员工承担的负担进行了推论。我们利用了洛杉矶县的地理不连续性：2015年洛杉矶市通过了一项最低工资法，而2016年加利福尼亚州通过了另一项不同的最低工资法。这导致该县在超过五年的时间里存在两种不同的最低工资标准。利用一项多年价格调查的新数据集，我们的分析表明，洛杉矶市较高最低工资的负担落在了高收入社区的顾客身上，以及低收入社区的房东和餐馆老板身上。我们进一步表明，受洛杉矶市最低工资约束的餐馆的反应组合——包括涨价、菜单变更和餐馆关闭——受到与受较低加州州最低工资约束的餐馆距离的影响。社区收入水平和与低工资竞争者的距离对设计最低工资政策具有重要启示。

28965.title: Racial Diversity and Racial Policy Preferences: The Great Migration and Civil Rights
28965.zh_title: 种族多样性与种族政策偏好：大迁徙与民权运动
28965.authors: Alvaro Calderon, Vasiliki Fouka, Marco Tabellini
28965.abstract: Between 1940 and 1970, more than 4 million African Americans moved from the South to the North of the United States, during the Second Great Migration. This same period witnessed the struggle and eventual success of the civil rights movement in ending institutionalized racial discrimination. This paper shows that the Great Migration and support for civil rights are causally linked. Predicting Black inflows with a shift-share instrument, we find that the Great Migration increased support for the Democratic Party and encouraged pro-civil rights activism in northern and western counties. These effects were not only driven by Black voters, but also by progressive and working class segments of the white population. We identify the salience of conditions prevailing in the South, measured through increased reporting of southern lynchings in northern newspapers, as a possible channel through which the Great Migration increased whites’ support for civil rights. Mirroring the changes in the electorate, non-southern Congress members became more likely to promote civil rights legislation, but also grew increasingly polarized along party lines on racial issues.
28965.zh_abstract: 在1940年至1970年间，超过400万非裔美国人从美国南部迁移到北部，这被称为第二次大迁徙。同一时期，民权运动经历了斗争并最终成功结束了制度化的种族歧视。本文表明，大迁徙与对民权的支持之间存在因果关系。利用份额转移工具预测黑人流入量，我们发现大迁徙增加了对民主党的支持，并鼓励了北部和西部各县的亲民权活动。这些影响不仅由黑人选民驱动，也由白人中进步和工人阶级群体驱动。我们识别出南方状况的显著性——通过北部报纸对南方私刑报道的增加来衡量——作为大迁徙可能增加白人对民权支持的一个渠道。与选民的这些变化相呼应，非南方的国会议员更有可能推动民权立法，但在种族问题上也日益按党派路线两极分化。

28964.title: Paying off the Competition: Contracting, Market Power, and Innovation Incentives
28964.zh_title: 收买竞争对手：合同、市场势力与创新激励
28964.authors: Xuelin Li, Andrew W. Lo, Richard T. Thakor
28964.abstract: This paper explores the relationship between a firm’s legal contracting environment and its innovation incentives. Using granular data from the pharmaceutical industry, we examine a contracting mechanism through which incumbents maintain market power: “pay-for-delay” agreements to delay the market entry of competitors. Exploiting a shock where such contracts become legally tenuous, we find that affected incumbents subsequently increase their innovation activity across a variety of project-level measures. Exploring the nature of this innovation, we also find that it is more “impactful” from a scientific and commercial standpoint. The results provide novel evidence that restricting the contracting space can boost innovation at the firm level. However, at the extensive margin we find a reduction in innovation by new entrants in response to increased competition, suggesting a nuanced effect on aggregate innovation.
28964.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了企业的法律合同环境与其创新激励之间的关系。利用制药行业的精细数据，我们研究了一种在位企业维持市场势力的合同机制：“付费延迟”协议，即通过支付费用来延迟竞争对手的市场进入。利用此类合同在法律上变得不稳固的冲击，我们发现受影响的企业随后在多个项目层面的指标上增加了创新活动。在探索这种创新的性质时，我们还发现它在科学和商业角度上更具“影响力”。这些结果提供了新的证据，表明限制合同空间可以促进企业层面的创新。然而，在广泛边际上，我们发现新进入者因竞争加剧而减少了创新，这表明对总体创新的影响是微妙的。
28964.meta: Programs：CF, EH, LE, PR；JEL：D42, D43, G31, K21, L41, L43, L65, O31, O32

28963.title: Noise in Expectations: Evidence from Analyst Forecasts
28963.zh_title: 预期中的噪声：来自分析师预测的证据
28963.abstract: This paper quantifies the amount of noise and bias in analysts’ forecast of corporate earnings at various horizons. We first show analyst forecasts outperform statistical forecasts at short-horizons, but underperform at longer horizons. We next decompose the relative accuracy of these forecasts into three components: (i) noise, (ii) bias and (iii) analysts’ information advantage over statistical forecasts. We find the information advantage is constant across forecasting horizons, while both noise and bias are increase linearly. We then show most existing models lack a mechanism to account for these facts. To generate such a mechanism, we consider a parsimonious variant of the model of Patton and Timmermann (2010) with a noisy cognitive default and show it quantitatively fits the data. The intuition underlying this model is that forecasters rely on their biased and noisy defaults more at longer horizons, as rational forecasts are less accurate. This model also quantitatively matches two non-targeted empirical relationships: (i) analyst disagreement increases with horizon and (ii) noise is an increasing function of volatility.
28963.zh_abstract: 本文量化了分析师在不同期限上对公司盈利预测中的噪声和偏差量。我们首先表明，分析师预测在短期优于统计预测，但在长期表现较差。接下来，我们将这些预测的相对准确性分解为三个部分：(i) 噪声，(ii) 偏差，以及 (iii) 分析师相对于统计预测的信息优势。我们发现信息优势在不同预测期限上保持不变，而噪声和偏差则线性增加。然后，我们表明大多数现有模型缺乏解释这些事实的机制。为了生成这样的机制，我们考虑了Patton和Timmermann (2010) 模型的一个简约变体，其中包含一个有噪声的认知默认值，并表明它在数量上拟合了数据。该模型背后的直觉是，预测者在更长的期限上更依赖他们有偏差和噪声的默认值，因为理性预测的准确性较低。该模型还定量匹配了两个非目标经验关系：(i) 分析师分歧随期限增加而增加，(ii) 噪声是波动率的增函数。

28962.title: Impacts of the Clean Air Act on the Power Sector from 1938-1994: Anticipation and Adaptation
28962.zh_title: 《清洁空气法》对电力行业的影响（1938-1994年）：预期与适应
28962.authors: Karen Clay, Akshaya Jha, Joshua A. Lewis, Edson R. Severnini
28962.abstract: This paper provides the first assessment of the plant-level productivity impacts of the 1970 Clean Air Act (CAA) that accounts for anticipatory responses. A simple theoretical framework is used to illustrate how credible signals of future regulatory actions can induce firms to make anticipatory investments in cleaner technologies, mitigating the subsequent impacts of environmental regulation. Drawing on newly digitized data on virtually every fossil-fuel power plant in the United States from 1938-1994, the paper uses a difference-in-differences approach to examine the impacts of the Act's nonattainment designations on coal-fired power plants. We find that nonattainment designation led to a 20% reduction in productivity among plants built before 1963, but had no effect on plants built after the passage of the 1963 CAA. The 1963 CAA resulted in minimal regulatory enforcement but served as a strong signal of impending federal air pollution regulation. Empirical and historical evidence suggests that electric utilities made anticipatory investments following the passage of the 1963 CAA. As a result, plants that opened after 1963 were better able to adapt to subsequent regulatory enforcement under the 1970 CAA. The aggregate productivity losses from the 1970 CAA were also substantially mitigated by the reallocation of output away from older, less productive power plants. These productivity losses would be substantially underestimated without utilizing data that extends well before the 1970 CAA.
28962.zh_abstract: 本文首次评估了1970年《清洁空气法》对电厂层面生产率的影响，并考虑了预期性反应。一个简单的理论框架被用来阐明，未来监管行动的可信信号如何促使企业进行预期性投资于更清洁的技术，从而减轻环境监管的后续影响。利用新近数字化的1938年至1994年间美国几乎所有化石燃料电厂的数据，本文采用双重差分法考察了该法案的未达标区域指定对燃煤电厂的影响。我们发现，未达标区域指定导致1963年前建成的电厂生产率下降20%，但对1963年《清洁空气法》通过后建成的电厂没有影响。1963年《清洁空气法》的监管执行力度极小，但作为即将到来的联邦空气污染监管的强烈信号。经验和历史证据表明，电力公司在1963年《清洁空气法》通过后进行了预期性投资。因此，1963年后投产的电厂能够更好地适应1970年《清洁空气法》下的后续监管执行。1970年《清洁空气法》造成的总体生产率损失也因产出从较老、效率较低的电厂重新分配而得到显著缓解。如果不利用远早于1970年《清洁空气法》的数据，这些生产率损失将被严重低估。
28962.meta: Programs：DAE, EEE, LE, PE；JEL：K32, N52, N72, Q41, Q48, Q52, Q58

28961.title: Dynamic Preference “Reversals” and Time Inconsistency
28961.zh_title: 动态偏好“逆转”与时间不一致性
28961.abstract: We study whether it’s possible to identify time-inconsistent preferences in empirical designs where preferences are elicited in advance at time 0, and then again at time 1, after the agent receives additional information. For single-peaked preferences, time-consistency is rejected only when the time-1 ranking between a pair of alternatives is always the reverse of the time-0 ranking. We establish variations and generalizations of this result. Since such stark reversals are rarely observed, choice-revision designs require stronger identification assumptions than perhaps previously appreciated. But we show that time-inconsistency is identifiable in environments where preferences over alternatives can be “priced-out.”
28961.zh_abstract: 我们研究在实证设计中，当偏好在时间0提前被引出，然后在时间1（在代理人获得额外信息后）再次被引出时，是否可能识别出时间不一致偏好。对于单峰偏好，只有当时间1对一对备选方案的排序总是与时间0的排序相反时，时间一致性才被拒绝。我们建立了这一结果的变体和推广。由于这种明显的逆转很少被观察到，选择修正设计可能需要比之前可能认识到的更强的识别假设。但我们表明，在可以对备选方案偏好进行“定价”的环境中，时间不一致性是可以识别的。
28961.meta: Programs：AG, DEV, EH, PE；JEL：C9, D0, D9

28960.title: The Effect of Beverage Taxes on Youth Consumption and BMI: Evidence from Mauritius
28960.zh_title: 饮料税对青少年消费和体重指数的影响：来自毛里求斯的证据
28960.authors: John Cawley, Michael R. Daly, Rebecca Thornton
28960.abstract: Taxes on sugar-sweetened beverages (SSBs) are relatively new and there is little evidence about their impact on SSB consumption or body mass index (as opposed to prices, purchases, or sales), their impact on youth (as opposed to on adults), or their impact in non-Western nations. This paper adds to the evidence base on all of these dimensions by estimating the effect of an SSB tax on the consumption and BMI of youth in Mauritius, an island nation in the Indian Ocean, which we compare to Maldives, another island nation in the Indian Ocean which did not implement an SSB tax during the time of our data. Results of difference-in-differences models indicate that the tax in Mauritius had no detectable impact on the consumption of SSBs or the body mass index of the pooled sample of boys and girls. However, models estimated separately by sex indicate that the probability that boys consumed SSBs fell by 9.4 percentage points (11%). These are among the first estimates of the effect of SSB taxes on youth consumption, and contribute to the limited evidence base on the impact of SSB taxes on weight, or in non-Western countries.
28960.zh_abstract: 对含糖饮料的税收相对较新，关于其对含糖饮料消费或体重指数（而非价格、购买量或销售量）的影响、对青少年（而非成人）的影响、或在非西方国家的影响，证据很少。本文通过估计含糖饮料税对毛里求斯（印度洋岛国）青少年消费和体重指数的影响，为所有这些维度增加了证据基础，我们将其与马尔代夫（另一个未在数据收集期间实施含糖饮料税的印度洋岛国）进行比较。双重差分模型的结果表明，毛里求斯的税收对男孩和女孩混合样本的含糖饮料消费或体重指数没有可检测到的影响。然而，按性别分别估计的模型表明，男孩消费含糖饮料的概率下降了9.4个百分点（11%）。这些是关于含糖饮料税对青少年消费影响的首批估计之一，并为含糖饮料税对体重或非西方国家影响的有限证据基础做出了贡献。
28960.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EH, PE；JEL：H2, H3, I12, I18, L66, O1

28959.title: The Demand for Executive Skills
28959.authors: Stephen Hansen, Tejas Ramdas, Raffaella Sadun, Joe Fuller
28959.abstract: We use a unique corpus of job descriptions for C-suite positions to document skills requirements in top managerial occupations across a large sample of firms. A novel algorithm maps the text of each executive search into six separate skill clusters reflecting cognitive, interpersonal, and operational dimensions. The data show an increasing relevance of social skills in top managerial occupations, and a greater emphasis on social skills in larger and more information intensive organizations. The results suggest the need for training, search and governance mechanisms able to facilitate the match between firms and top executives along multiple and imperfectly observable skills.
28959.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个独特的企业高管职位描述语料库，记录了大量样本公司中顶级管理职业的技能要求。一种新颖的算法将每份高管搜索文本映射到六个独立的技能集群，分别反映认知、人际和操作维度。数据显示，社交技能在顶级管理职业中的重要性日益增加，并且在规模更大、信息密集度更高的组织中，对社交技能的重视程度更高。结果表明，需要建立能够促进企业与高管之间在多种且不完全可观察的技能上实现匹配的培训、搜索和治理机制。

28958.title: The Great Unequalizer: Initial Health Effects of COVID-19 in the United States
28958.zh_title: 伟大的不平等器：美国COVID-19的初期健康影响
28958.authors: Marcella Alsan, Amitabh Chandra, Kosali I. Simon
28958.abstract: We measure inequities from the COVID-19 pandemic on mortality and hospitalizations in the United States during the early months of the outbreak. We discuss challenges in measuring health outcomes and health inequality, some of which are specific to COVID-19 and others that complicate attribution during most large health shocks. As in past epidemics, pre-existing biological and social vulnerabilities profoundly influenced the distribution of disease. In addition to the elderly, Hispanic, Black and Native American communities were disproportionately affected by the virus, particularly when assessed using the years of potential life lost metric. For example, Hispanic and Black Americans in 2020 saw 39.5 and 25 percent increases in excess mortality relative to trend, compared to a less than 15 percent increase for Whites; we find losses in potential years of life three to four times larger among Hispanic and Black compared to White Americans. Individual-level data from a commercially insured population show that otherwise similar Black and Hispanic enrollees were hospitalized due to COVID-19 at a higher rate than White enrollees. We provide a conceptual framework and initial empirical analysis which seek to shed light on contributors to pandemic-related health inequality, and suggest areas for future research.
28958.zh_abstract: 我们衡量了疫情爆发初期美国COVID-19大流行在死亡率和住院率方面造成的不平等。我们讨论了衡量健康结果和健康不平等所面临的挑战，其中一些挑战是COVID-19特有的，另一些则是在大多数重大健康冲击期间使归因复杂化的因素。与以往的流行病一样，既存的生物学和社会脆弱性深刻影响了疾病的分布。除老年人外，西班牙裔、黑人和美洲原住民社区受到该病毒的影响尤为严重，尤其是在使用潜在寿命损失年数指标进行评估时。例如，2020年西班牙裔和黑人的超额死亡率相对于趋势分别增长了39.5%和25%，而白人的增幅不到15%；我们发现西班牙裔和黑人的潜在寿命损失年数是白人的三到四倍。来自商业保险人群的个体层面数据显示，在其他方面相似的条件下，黑人和西班牙裔参保人因COVID-19住院的比例高于白人参保人。我们提供了一个概念框架和初步实证分析，旨在阐明与大流行相关的健康不平等的促成因素，并提出了未来研究的方向。
28958.meta: Programs：DAE, EH, PE；JEL：I1, I14, I18, J1, J78, N0

28957.title: The Distributional Effects of Trade: Theory and Evidence from the United States
28957.zh_title: 贸易的分配效应：来自美国的理论与证据
28957.abstract: How much do consumption patterns matter for the impact of international trade on inequality? In neoclassical trade models, the effects of trade shocks on consumers' purchasing power are governed by the shares of imports in consumer expenditures, under no parametric assumptions on preferences and technology. This paper provides in-depth measurement of import shares across the income distribution in the United States, using new datasets linking expenditure and customs microdata. Contrary to common wisdom, we find that import shares are flat throughout the income distribution: the purchasing-power gains from lower trade costs are distributionally neutral. Accounting for changes in wages in addition to prices in a unified nonparametric framework, we find substantial distributional effects that arise within, but not across, income and education groups. There is little impact of a fall in trade costs on inequality, even though trade shocks generate winners and losers at all income levels, via wage changes.
28957.zh_abstract: 消费模式对国际贸易影响不平等程度有多大？在新古典贸易模型中，贸易冲击对消费者购买力的影响由进口在消费者支出中的份额决定，且无需对偏好和技术做出参数假设。本文利用连接支出和海关微观数据的新数据集，对美国不同收入群体的进口份额进行了深入测量。与普遍看法相反，我们发现进口份额在整个收入分配中保持平稳：降低贸易成本带来的购买力收益在分配上是中性的。在一个统一的非参数框架中，除了价格变化外，还考虑了工资变化，我们发现显著的分配效应出现在收入和教育群体内部，而非群体之间。尽管贸易冲击通过工资变化在所有收入水平上产生了赢家和输家，但贸易成本下降对不平等的影响很小。

28956.title: Does Saving Cause Borrowing? Implications for the Co-Holding Puzzle
28956.zh_title: 储蓄会导致借贷吗？对共同持有之谜的启示
28956.abstract: Using an experiment in which 3.1 million bank customers were encouraged to save, we explore the mechanisms behind co-holding liquid savings and credit card debt. Theoretically, we first show that the joint responses of spending, saving, and borrowing to the nudge differ for different economic models of co-holding. Using machine learning techniques, we then find that the most responsive individuals reduce spending and increase their savings by 4.9% (206 USD PPP per month) while their credit card debt remains unchanged. For them, the marginal responses to the nudge are consistent with our model of co-holding for the purpose of self- or partner control.
28956.zh_abstract: 通过一项鼓励310万银行客户储蓄的实验，我们探讨了同时持有流动储蓄和信用卡债务背后的机制。理论上，我们首先表明，对于不同的共同持有经济模型，储蓄、支出和借贷对助推措施的共同反应是不同的。利用机器学习技术，我们发现反应最强烈的个体减少了支出，并将储蓄增加了4.9%（每月206美元购买力平价），而他们的信用卡债务保持不变。对他们而言，对助推措施的边际反应与我们的共同持有模型一致，该模型旨在实现自我或伴侣控制。

28955.title: Who Will Pay for Legacy Utility Costs?
28955.zh_title: 谁将为遗留的公用事业成本买单？
28955.abstract: The growing “electrify everything” movement aims to reduce carbon dioxide emissions by transitioning households and ﬁrms away from natural gas toward electricity. This paper considers what this transition means for the customers who are left behind. Using historical evidence from growing and shrinking U.S. natural gas utilities, we show that utilities add pipelines but rarely remove them, even when the customer base from which to recover costs is shrinking. Correspondingly, we ﬁnd that utility revenues decrease less than one-for-one when a customer base is shrinking, consistent with higher bills for remaining customers. We then use our empirical estimates to predict how customer bills might increase in the future for diﬀerent levels of building electriﬁcation. We highlight the equity implications of our results and conclude by discussing alternative utility ﬁnancing options such as recouping ﬁxed costs through taxes rather than prices.
28955.zh_abstract: 日益增长的“全面电气化”运动旨在通过将家庭和企业从天然气转向电力来减少二氧化碳排放。本文探讨了这一转型对留下的客户意味着什么。利用美国天然气公用事业增长和萎缩的历史证据，我们表明公用事业公司会新增管道，但很少拆除它们，即使回收成本的客户基础正在萎缩。相应地，我们发现当客户基础萎缩时，公用事业收入的下降幅度小于一对一的比例，这与剩余客户账单增加的情况一致。然后，我们利用实证估计来预测，在不同程度的建筑电气化水平下，客户账单未来可能如何增加。我们强调了结果的公平性含义，最后讨论了替代的公用事业融资方案，例如通过税收而非价格来回收固定成本。

28954.title: Interest Rate Skewness and Biased Beliefs
28954.abstract: The conditional skewness of Treasury yields is an important indicator of the risks to the macroeconomic outlook. Positive skewness signals upside risk to interest rates during periods of accommodative monetary policy and an upward-sloping yield curve, and vice versa. Skewness has substantial predictive power for future bond excess returns, high-frequency interest rate changes around FOMC announcements, and survey forecast errors for interest rates. The estimated expectational errors, or biases in beliefs, are quantitatively important for statistical bond risk premia. These findings are consistent with a heterogeneous-beliefs model where one of the agents is wrong about consumption growth.
28954.zh_abstract: 国债收益率的条件偏斜是宏观经济前景风险的重要指标。在宽松货币政策和收益率曲线向上倾斜的时期，正偏斜预示着利率的上行风险，反之亦然。偏斜对未来债券超额收益、联邦公开市场委员会公告前后的高频利率变化以及利率调查预测误差具有显著的预测能力。估计的预期误差（即信念偏差）对统计上的债券风险溢价具有定量上的重要性。这些发现与一个异质性信念模型一致，在该模型中，其中一个主体对消费增长的判断是错误的。

28953.title: Neighborhoods Matter: Assessing the Evidence for Place Effects
28953.zh_title: 邻里重要吗：评估地方效应的证据
28953.abstract: How does one's place of residence affect individual behavior and long-run outcomes? Understanding neighborhood and place effects has been a leading question for social scientists during the past half-century. Recent empirical studies using experimental and quasi-experimental research designs have generated new insights on the importance of residential neighborhoods in childhood and adulthood. This paper summarizes the recent neighborhood effects literature and interprets the findings. Childhood neighborhoods affect long-run economic and educational outcomes in a manner consistent with exposure models of neighborhood effects. For adults, neighborhood environments matter for their health and well-being but have more ambiguous impacts on labor market outcomes. We discuss the evidence on the mechanisms behind the observed patterns and conclude by highlighting directions for future research.
28953.zh_abstract: 一个人的居住地如何影响个人行为和长期结果？理解邻里和地方效应一直是过去半个世纪社会科学家关注的首要问题。最近使用实验和准实验研究设计的实证研究，对居住社区在童年和成年期的重要性产生了新的见解。本文总结了近期的邻里效应文献并解释了这些发现。童年时期的邻里环境以与邻里效应的暴露模型一致的方式影响长期的经济和教育结果。对于成年人而言，邻里环境对他们的健康和福祉很重要，但对劳动力市场结果的影响则更为模糊。我们讨论了观察到的模式背后机制的证据，最后指出了未来研究的方向。
28953.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：H75, I38, R23, R38

28952.title: Deficit Follies
28952.authors: Johannes Brumm, Xiangyu Feng, Laurence J. Kotlikoff, Felix Kubler
28952.abstract: Deficit finance is free when the growth rate routinely exceeds the government's borrowing rate. Or so many people say. This note presents three counterexamples. Each features a simple OLG economy with a zero growth rate and a negative government borrowing rate. None provides a basis for taking from the young and giving to the old. One example features idiosyncratic risk, one features policy uncertainty, and one features a safe borrowing rate that exceeds the safe lending rate. Progressive taxation cures the first problem. Policy resolution cures the second. And improved intermediation, perhaps organized by the government, cures the third. The three models are parables. Each conveys an inconvenient truth. Seemingly free deficits may, on careful inspection, be far more costly than they appear. Indeed, government intergenerational redistribution can lower the government borrowing rate, encouraging yet more inefficient deficit finance.
28952.zh_abstract: 当增长率通常超过政府借款利率时，赤字融资是免费的。或者很多人这么说。本文提出了三个反例。每个例子都描述了一个简单的代际交叠经济，其增长率为零，政府借款利率为负。没有一个例子为从年轻人那里拿走并给予老年人提供基础。一个例子涉及特质风险，一个涉及政策不确定性，还有一个涉及安全借款利率超过安全贷款利率。累进税制解决了第一个问题。政策解决解决了第二个问题。改善中介服务（或许由政府组织）解决了第三个问题。这三个模型是寓言。每个都传达了一个令人不快的事实。看似免费的赤字，仔细审视后，可能远比表面看起来代价高昂。事实上，政府的代际再分配可以降低政府借款利率，从而鼓励更多低效的赤字融资。

28951.title: When Interest Rates Go Low, Should Public Debt Go High?
28951.zh_title: 当利率走低时，公共债务应该走高吗？
28951.authors: Johannes Brumm, Xiangyu Feng, Laurence J. Kotlikoff, Felix Kubler
28951.abstract: Is deficit finance free when real borrowing rates are routinely lower than growth rates? Specifically, can the government make all generations better off by perpetually taking from the young and giving to the old? We study this question in stochastic closed- and open-economy OLG models. Unfortunately, Pareto gains are predicted only for implausible calibrations. Even then, the gains reflect improved intergenerational risk-sharing, improved international risk-sharing, and beggaring thy neighbor – not intergenerational redistribution per se. As we show, theoretically and quantitatively, low government borrowing rates suggest state-contingent, bilateral transfers between generations, not unconditional, unilateral redistribution from future to current generations.
28951.zh_abstract: 当实际借贷利率通常低于增长率时，赤字融资是否免费？具体而言，政府能否通过永久性地从年轻一代索取并给予老年一代，使所有世代变得更好？我们在随机封闭经济和开放经济OLG模型中研究这一问题。不幸的是，帕累托改进仅在不可信的校准中才被预测到。即便如此，这些改进反映的是代际风险分担的改善、国际风险分担的改善以及以邻为壑——而非代际再分配本身。正如我们在理论和数量上所示，低政府借贷利率暗示了世代之间基于状态的、双边转移，而非从未来世代到当前世代的无条件、单边再分配。
28951.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, PE；JEL：H0, H2, H21, H22, H5, H6

28950.title: Mussa Puzzle Redux
28950.abstract: The Mussa (1986) puzzle is the observation of a sharp and simultaneous increase in the volatility of both nominal and real exchange rates following the end of the Bretton Woods System of pegged exchange rates in 1973. It is commonly viewed as a central piece of evidence in favor of monetary non-neutrality because it is an instance in which a change in the monetary regime caused a dramatic change in the equilibrium behavior of a real variable (the real exchange rate) and is often further interpreted as direct evidence in favor of models with nominal rigidities in price setting. This paper shows that the data do not support this latter conclusion because there was no simultaneous change in the properties of the other macro variables, nominal or real. We show that an extended set of Mussa facts equally falsifies both conventional flexible-price RBC models and sticky-price New Keynesian models as explanations for the Mussa puzzle. We present a resolution to the broader Mussa puzzle based on a model of segmented financial market — a particular type of financial friction by which the bulk of the nominal exchange rate risk is held by financial intermediaries and is not shared smoothly throughout the economy. We argue that rather than discriminating between models with sticky versus flexible prices, or monetary versus productivity shocks, the Mussa puzzle provides sharp evidence in favor of models with monetary non-neutrality arising in the financial market, suggesting the importance of monetary transmission via the risk premium channel.
28950.zh_abstract: 穆萨（1986）谜题是指观察到在1973年布雷顿森林固定汇率体系结束后，名义汇率和实际汇率的波动性同时急剧增加。它通常被视为支持货币非中性的核心证据，因为这是一个货币制度变化导致实际变量（实际汇率）均衡行为发生剧烈变化的实例，并且常被进一步解释为支持价格设定存在名义刚性模型的直接证据。本文表明，数据并不支持后一个结论，因为其他宏观变量（无论是名义的还是实际的）的性质并未同时发生变化。我们证明，一组扩展的穆萨事实同样否定了传统的灵活价格RBC模型和粘性价格新凯恩斯模型作为穆萨谜题的解释。我们基于一个分割金融市场模型——一种特定类型的金融摩擦，其中大部分名义汇率风险由金融中介持有，并未在整个经济中平滑分担——提出了对更广泛穆萨谜题的一个解决方案。我们认为，穆萨谜题并非在粘性价格与灵活价格模型之间，或货币冲击与生产率冲击之间进行区分，而是提供了支持金融市场中产生货币非中性模型的明确证据，暗示了通过风险溢价渠道进行货币传导的重要性。
28950.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E30, E40, E50, F30, F40, G10

28949.title: Coal-Fired Power Plant Retirements in the U.S.
28949.authors: Rebecca J. Davis, J. Scott Holladay, Charles Sims
28949.abstract: We summarize the history of U.S. coal-fired plant retirements over the last decade, describe planned future retirements, and forecast the remaining operating life for every operating coal-fired generator. We summarize the technology and location trends that are correlated with the observed retirements. We then describe a theoretical model of the retirement decision coal generator owners face. We use retirements from the last decade to quantify the relationships in the model for retired generators. Our model predicts that three-quarters of coal generation capacity will retire in the next twenty years, with most of that retirement concentrated in the next five years. Policy has limited ability to affect retirement times. A $\$20$ per MWh electricity subsidy extends the average life of a generator by six years. A $\$51$ per ton carbon tax brings forward retirement dates by about two years. In all scenarios, a handful of electricity generators remain on the grid beyond our forecast horizon.
28949.zh_abstract: 我们总结了过去十年美国燃煤电厂退役的历史，描述了未来计划的退役情况，并预测了每台在运燃煤发电机组的剩余运营寿命。我们总结了与观察到的退役相关的技术和位置趋势。然后，我们描述了一个燃煤发电机所有者面临的退役决策的理论模型。我们利用过去十年的退役数据来量化模型中已退役发电机的关系。我们的模型预测，四分之三的燃煤发电容量将在未来二十年内退役，其中大部分退役集中在未来五年。政策对退役时间的影响有限。每兆瓦时20美元的电价补贴将发电机的平均寿命延长六年。每吨51美元的碳税将退役日期提前约两年。在所有情景中，少数发电机将在我们的预测期之后继续并网运行。

28948.title: A Seven-College Experiment Using Algorithms to Track Students: Impacts and Implications for Equity and Fairness
28948.zh_title: 一项使用算法追踪学生的七所大学实验：对公平与公正的影响及启示
28948.authors: Peter Bergman, Elizabeth Kopko, Julio E. Rodriguez
28948.abstract: Tracking is widespread in education. In U.S. post-secondary education alone, at least 71% of colleges use a test to track students into various courses. However, there are concerns that placement tests lack validity and unnecessarily reduce education opportunities for students from under-represented groups. While research has shown that tracking can improve student learning, inaccurate placement has consequences: students face misaligned curricula and must pay tuition for remedial courses that do not bear credits toward graduation. We develop an alternative system that uses algorithms to predict college readiness and track students into courses. Compared to the most widely-used placement tests in the country, the algorithms are more predictive of future performance. We conduct an experiment across seven colleges to evaluate the effects of algorithmic placement. Placement rates into college-level courses increase substantially without reducing pass rates. Algorithmic placement generally, though not always, narrows differences in college placement rates and remedial course taking across demographic groups. We use the experimental design and variation in placement rates to assess the disparate impact of each system. Test scores exhibit substantially more discrimination than algorithms; a significant share of test-score disparities between Hispanic or Black students and white students is explained by discrimination. We also show that the selective labels problem nearly doubles the prediction error for college English performance but has almost no impact on the prediction error for college math performance. A detailed cost analysis shows that algorithmic placement is socially efficient: it increases college credits earned while saving costs for students and the government.
28948.zh_abstract: 追踪在教育中广泛存在。仅在美国高等教育中，至少71%的大学使用测试将学生追踪到不同的课程中。然而，人们担心分班测试缺乏有效性，并且不必要地减少了来自代表性不足群体的学生的教育机会。虽然研究表明追踪可以提高学生学习效果，但不准确的分班会产生后果：学生面临不匹配的课程，并且必须为不计入毕业学分的补习课程支付学费。我们开发了一个替代系统，该系统使用算法来预测大学准备情况并将学生追踪到课程中。与全国使用最广泛的分班测试相比，这些算法更能预测未来表现。我们在七所大学进行了一项实验，以评估算法分班的效果。进入大学水平课程的分班率大幅提高，而通过率并未降低。算法分班通常（尽管并非总是）缩小了不同人口群体在大学分班率和补习课程修读方面的差异。我们利用实验设计和分班率的变化来评估每个系统的差异性影响。测试分数表现出比算法大得多的歧视；西班牙裔或黑人学生与白人学生之间测试分数差异的很大一部分是由歧视解释的。我们还表明，选择性标签问题使大学英语成绩的预测误差几乎翻倍，但对大学数学成绩的预测误差几乎没有影响。详细的成本分析表明，算法分班具有社会效率：它增加了大学学分获得，同时为学生和政府节省了成本。

28947.title: A World Trading System for the Twenty-First Century
28947.zh_title: 二十一世纪的全球贸易体系
28947.abstract: I explore whether the world trading system of the twentieth century can be adapted to address the challenges of the twenty-first. I first develop an understanding of how GATT functioned during the twentieth century, and which features of the economic environment were most important in determining its success. I then examine a list of changes in the global economy that are sometimes identified as warranting changes in the design of the GATT/WTO. I argue that the "terms-of-trade" theory of trade agreements provides a compelling framework for understanding the impact of GATT in the twentieth century, and I show that when viewed through this lens, the rationale for GATT’s design features transcend many, though not all, of the current challenges facing the WTO.
28947.zh_abstract: 我探讨了二十世纪的全球贸易体系能否适应二十一世纪的挑战。我首先理解了GATT在二十世纪是如何运作的，以及经济环境的哪些特征对其成功最为重要。然后，我考察了一系列全球经济的变化，这些变化有时被认为需要改变GATT/WTO的设计。我认为，贸易协定的“贸易条件”理论为理解GATT在二十世纪的影响提供了一个令人信服的框架，并且我表明，从这个角度来看，GATT设计特征的理由超越了WTO当前面临的许多（尽管不是全部）挑战。

28946.title: Smart Matching Platforms and Heterogeneous Beliefs in Centralized School Choice
28946.zh_title: 集中择校中的智能匹配平台与异质性信念
28946.authors: Felipe Arteaga, Adam J. Kapor, Christopher A. Neilson, Seth D. Zimmerman
28946.abstract: Many school districts with centralized school choice adopt strategyproof assignment mechanisms to relieve applicants of the need to strategize on the basis of beliefs about their own admissions chances. This paper shows that beliefs about admissions chances shape choice outcomes even when the assignment mechanism is strategyproof by influencing the way applicants search for schools, and that “smart matching platforms” that provide live feedback on admissions chances help applicants search more effectively. Motivated by a model in which applicants engage in costly search for schools and over-optimism can lead to under-search, we use data from a large-scale survey of choice participants in Chile to show that learning about schools is hard, that beliefs about admissions chances guide the decision to stop searching, and that applicants systematically underestimate non-placement risk. We then use RCT and RD research designs to evaluate scaled live feedback policies in the Chilean and New Haven choice systems. 22% of applicants submitting applications where risks of non-placement are high respond to warnings by adding schools to their lists, reducing non-placement risk by 58% and increasing test score value added at the schools where they enroll by 0.10 standard deviations. Reducing the burden of school choice requires not just strategyproofness inside the centralized system, but also choice supports for the strategic decisions that inevitably remain outside of it.
28946.zh_abstract: 许多实行集中择校的学区采用策略证明的分配机制，以减轻申请者基于对自己录取机会的信念而进行策略性思考的需要。本文表明，即使分配机制是策略证明的，关于录取机会的信念也会通过影响申请者搜索学校的方式，来塑造择校结果，而“智能匹配平台”通过提供关于录取机会的实时反馈，帮助申请者更有效地进行搜索。受一个模型的启发，在该模型中，申请者对学校进行有成本的搜索，而过度乐观可能导致搜索不足，我们利用智利一项大规模择校参与者调查的数据来表明，了解学校是困难的，关于录取机会的信念指导着停止搜索的决定，并且申请者系统性地低估了未被录取的风险。然后，我们利用随机对照试验和断点回归设计来评估智利和纽黑文择校系统中大规模实时反馈政策的效果。在提交申请且未被录取风险较高的申请者中，有22%的人通过向名单中添加学校来回应警告，这将未被录取风险降低了58%，并将他们入读学校的考试分数增值提高了0.10个标准差。减轻择校负担不仅需要集中系统内部的策略证明性，还需要为系统外部不可避免留下的战略决策提供择校支持。
28946.meta: Programs：ED, IO, LS；JEL：D83, H75, I2, J01

28999.title: The Diffusion of New Technologies
28999.authors: Aakash Kalyani, Nicholas Bloom, Marcela Carvalho, Tarek Alexander Hassan, Josh Lerner, Ahmed Tahoun
28999.abstract: We identify phrases associated with novel technologies using textual analysis of patents, job postings, and earnings calls, enabling us to identify four stylized facts on the diffusion of jobs relating to new technologies. First, the development of economically impactful new technologies is geographically highly concentrated, more so even than overall patenting: 56% of the most economically impactful technologies come from just two U.S. locations, Silicon Valley and the Northeast Corridor. Second, as the technologies mature and the number of related jobs grows, hiring spreads geographically. But this process is very slow, taking around 50 years to disperse fully. Third, while initial hiring in new technologies is highly skill biased, over time the mean skill level in new positions declines, drawing in an increasing number of lower-skilled workers. Finally, the geographic spread of hiring is slowest for higher-skilled positions, with the locations where new technologies were pioneered remaining the focus for the technology’s high-skill jobs for decades.
28999.zh_abstract: 我们利用对专利、职位发布和财报电话会议的文本分析，识别与新技术相关的短语，从而能够确定关于新技术相关工作岗位扩散的四个典型事实。第一，具有经济影响力的新技术的开发在地理上高度集中，甚至比整体专利活动更为集中：56%最具经济影响力的技术仅来自美国的两个地点——硅谷和东北走廊。第二，随着技术成熟和相关工作岗位数量增长，招聘活动在地理上扩散。但这一过程非常缓慢，大约需要50年才能完全分散。第三，虽然新技术领域的初始招聘高度偏向高技能，但随着时间的推移，新职位的平均技能水平下降，吸引了越来越多的低技能工人。最后，招聘的地理扩散对于高技能职位最为缓慢，新技术发源地在数十年内仍然是该技术高技能岗位的焦点。

28998.title: Physician-Induced Demand: Evidence from China’s Drug Price Zero-Markup Policy
28998.zh_title: 医生诱导需求：来自中国药品零加成政策的证据
28998.authors: Hanming Fang, Xiaoyan Lei, Julie Shi, Xuejie Yi
28998.abstract: We use a natural experiment in China's health care reform, in which the government mandated zero markups for drugs sold in public hospitals, to study physician-induced demand for medical care. We develop a theoretical model that robustly predicts that the drug price zero markup policy (ZMP) will lead to a reduction in the demand for drugs but an increase in the demand for non-drug services, only when the demands for drugs and non-drug services are at least partially physician induced. Our model also yields testable predictions of the impact of the ZMP regarding the equilibrium number of treated patients. Exploiting the staggered rollout of the ZMP and a unique claims data set, we find that, at the admission level, the reform decreases drug expenses by 63.4 log points (47.0 percent), but the reduction in drug expenses is almost fully substituted by the increases in expenses for non-drug services. Quantitatively similar results are also obtained at the physician and at the hospital levels. We also show that the ZMP reduces the number of patients in the treated hospitals, as predicted by the model, and that the reform has little impact on the quality of health care proxied by the readmission rate.
28998.zh_abstract: 我们利用中国医疗改革中的一项自然实验——政府规定公立医院销售药品实行零加成——来研究医生对医疗服务的诱导需求。我们开发了一个理论模型，该模型稳健地预测：只有当药品和非药品服务的需求至少部分由医生诱导时，药品零加成政策（ZMP）才会导致药品需求减少但非药品服务需求增加。我们的模型还就ZMP对均衡治疗患者数量的影响给出了可检验的预测。利用ZMP的分阶段推出和独特的索赔数据集，我们发现，在入院层面，改革使药品费用下降了63.4个对数点（47.0%），但药品费用的减少几乎完全被非药品服务费用的增加所替代。在医生层面和医院层面也获得了数量上相似的结果。我们还表明，正如模型所预测的，ZMP减少了治疗医院的患者数量，并且改革对以再入院率衡量的医疗质量几乎没有影响。

28997.title: Reputation and Partial Default
28997.abstract: This paper presents a continuous-time reputation model of sovereign debt allowing for both varying levels of partial default and full default. In it, a government can be a non-strategic commitment type, or a strategic opportunistic type, and a government's reputation is its equilibrium Bayesian posterior of being the commitment type. Our equilibrium has that for bond levels reachable by both types without defaulting, bigger partial defaults (or bigger haircuts for bond holders) imply higher interest rates for subsequent bond issuances, as in the data.
28997.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一个允许不同程度的部分违约和完全违约的主权债务连续时间声誉模型。在该模型中，政府可以是非策略性的承诺类型，也可以是策略性的机会主义类型，政府的声誉是其作为承诺类型的均衡贝叶斯后验概率。我们的均衡表明，对于两种类型在不违约情况下都能达到的债券水平，更大的部分违约（或对债券持有人更大的减记）意味着后续债券发行的利率更高，这与数据相符。

28996.title: Micro Risks and (Robust) Pareto Improving Policies
28996.zh_title: 微观风险与（稳健的）帕累托改进政策
28996.authors: Mark A. Aguiar, Manuel Amador, Cristina Arellano
28996.abstract: We provide sufficient conditions for the feasibility of robust Pareto-improving (RPI) fiscal policies in the class of incomplete markets models of Bewley-Huggett-Aiyagari and when the interest rate on government debt is below the growth rate (r < g). We allow for arbitrary heterogeneity in preferences and income risk and a potential wedge between the return to capital and to government bonds. An RPI improves risk sharing and can induce a more efficient level of capital. We show that the elasticities of aggregate savings to changes in interest rates are the crucial ingredients that determine the feasibility of RPIs. We establish that government debt and capital investment associated with an RPI may be complements along the transition, rather than the traditional substitutes. Our analysis shifts the focus of fiscal policy in incomplete markets from explicitly redistributive policies to using government bonds and simple subsidies to robustly improve welfare of all agents at all points in time.
28996.zh_abstract: 我们为在Bewley-Huggett-Aiyagari类不完备市场模型中，且政府债务利率低于增长率（r < g）时，实施稳健帕累托改进（RPI）财政政策的可行性提供了充分条件。我们允许偏好和收入风险存在任意异质性，以及资本回报率与政府债券回报率之间存在潜在差异。RPI能够改善风险分担，并可能引致更有效的资本水平。我们表明，储蓄总量对利率变化的弹性是决定RPI可行性的关键因素。我们证明，与RPI相关的政府债务和资本投资在转型过程中可能是互补的，而非传统的替代关系。我们的分析将不完备市场中的财政政策焦点从明确的再分配政策转向利用政府债券和简单补贴，以在所有时间点稳健地改善所有代理人的福利。

28995.title: The Effects of Climate Change on Labor and Capital Reallocation
28995.zh_title: 气候变化对劳动力和资本重新配置的影响
28995.authors: Christoph Albert, Paula Bustos, Jacopo Ponticelli
28995.abstract: Climate change is expected to reduce agricultural productivity in developing countries. Classic international trade and geography models predict that the optimal adaptation response is a reallocation of capital and labor from agriculture towards sectors and regions gaining comparative advantage. In this paper, we provide evidence on the effects of recent changes in climate in Brazil to understand to what extent factor market frictions constrain this reallocation process. We document that persistent increases in dryness do not generate capital reallocation but a sharp reduction in credit to all sectors in both drying areas and financially integrated regions. In addition, dryness generates a large reduction in agricultural employment. Workers staying in drying regions reallocate towards manufacturing but climate migrants are allocated to small firms outside of manufacturing in destination regions. The evidence suggests that frictions in the interbank market and spatial labor market frictions constrain the reallocation process from agriculture to manufacturing.
28995.zh_abstract: 气候变化预计将降低发展中国家的农业生产力。经典国际贸易和地理模型预测，最优的适应反应是将资本和劳动力从农业重新配置到获得比较优势的部门和地区。在本文中，我们提供了巴西近期气候变化影响的证据，以了解要素市场摩擦在多大程度上制约了这一重新配置过程。我们记录到，持续增加的干旱并未导致资本重新配置，而是导致干旱地区以及金融一体化地区的所有部门的信贷急剧减少。此外，干旱导致农业就业大幅减少。留在干旱地区的工人重新配置到制造业，但气候移民在目的地地区被分配到制造业以外的小型企业。证据表明，银行间市场的摩擦和空间劳动力市场的摩擦制约了从农业到制造业的重新配置过程。
28995.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, EEE, ITI；JEL：J61, O1, O16, Q54

28994.title: Policy Contagion: What Do We Learn from Financial Reforms?
28994.zh_title: 政策传染：我们从金融改革中学到了什么？
28994.authors: Nan Li, Chris Papageorgiou, Tong Xu, Tao Zha
28994.abstract: We use financial reforms as a case study to understand the temporal clustering of policy changes across countries, shedding light on the broader phenomenon of global policy contagion. We constructed a comprehensive database of domestic financial reforms spanning 90 countries from 1973 to 2014. Using this dataset, we estimate a semi-structural model that incorporates key factors identified in the literature. We find that (1) geopolitical influence and cross-country learning drove the global surge in reforms during the 1990s, and (2) reversals of financial reforms in developing countries after the global financial crisis reflected shifting beliefs about their growth effects.
28994.zh_abstract: 我们以金融改革为案例，研究各国政策变化在时间上的聚集现象，从而揭示全球政策传染这一更广泛的现象。我们构建了一个涵盖1973年至2014年90个国家的国内金融改革综合数据库。利用该数据集，我们估计了一个半结构模型，该模型纳入了文献中识别的关键因素。我们发现：（1）地缘政治影响和跨国学习推动了20世纪90年代全球改革浪潮；（2）全球金融危机后发展中国家金融改革的逆转，反映了对其增长效应信念的转变。

28993.title: The Impact of Local Residential Land Use Restrictions on Land Values Across and Within Single Family Housing Markets
28993.zh_title: 地方住宅用地限制对单一家庭住房市场内外部土地价值的影响
28993.abstract: We provide estimates of the impact of restrictive residential land use environments on the price of land across major American housing markets. Using micro data on vacant land purchased to develop single family housing, we implement a new empirical strategy for estimating so-called ‘zoning taxes’ – the amount by which land prices are bid up due to supply side regulations. Our results are broadly consistent with previous findings that zoning taxes are especially burdensome in large coastal markets. However, our more recent data indicates that price impacts in the big west coast markets now are the largest in the nation. In the San Francisco, Los Angeles, and Seattle metropolitan areas, the price of land everywhere within those three markets having been bid up by amounts that at least equal typical household income. Finally, we show that our zoning tax estimates are strongly positively correlated with a new measure of local housing market supply constraint (the Wharton Residential Land Use Regulatory Index of 2018). This relationship is not mechanically driven as the regulatory index is constructed from survey data that do not incorporate land or house price data in any way.
28993.zh_abstract: 我们估算了限制性住宅用地环境对美国主要住房市场土地价格的影响。利用用于开发单一家庭住房的空置土地微观数据，我们实施了一种新的实证策略来估算所谓的“区划税”——即由于供给侧监管而导致土地价格上涨的幅度。我们的结果与先前的研究结果大体一致，即区划税在大型沿海市场中尤为沉重。然而，我们更新的数据表明，西海岸大型市场的价格影响现在是全国最大的。在旧金山、洛杉矶和西雅图大都市区，这三个市场内所有地方的土地价格都被推高到至少相当于典型家庭收入的水平。最后，我们表明，我们的区划税估算值与当地住房市场供给约束的新衡量指标（2018年沃顿住宅用地监管指数）呈强正相关。这种关系并非机械驱动，因为该监管指数是基于调查数据构建的，这些数据并未以任何方式纳入土地或房价数据。

28992.title: Converging to Converge? A Comment
28992.abstract: Kremer, Willis, and You (2021) revisit cross-country convergence patterns over the last six decades. They provide evidence that the lack of convergence that applied early in the sample has now been replaced by modest convergence. They also argue this relationship is driven by convergence in various determinants of economic growth across countries and a flattening of the relationship between these determinants and growth. Although the patterns documented by the authors are intriguing, our reanalysis finds that these results are driven by the lack of country fixed effects controlling for unobserved determinants of GDP per capita across countries. We show theoretically and empirically that failure to include country fixed effects will create a bias in convergence coeffcients towards zero and this bias can be time-varying, even when the underlying country-level parameters are stable. These results are relevant not just for the current paper, but for the convergence literature more generally. Our reanalysis finds no evidence of major changes in patterns of convergence and, more importantly, no flattening of the relationship between institutional variables and economic growth. Focusing on democracy, we show that this variable's impact continues to be precisely estimated and if anything a little larger than at the beginning of the sample.
28992.zh_abstract: Kremer、Willis和You（2021）重新审视了过去六十年的跨国趋同模式。他们提供的证据表明，样本早期存在的缺乏趋同现象现在已被适度的趋同所取代。他们还认为，这种关系是由各国经济增长各种决定因素的趋同以及这些决定因素与增长之间关系的扁平化所驱动的。尽管作者记录的模式引人入胜，但我们的重新分析发现，这些结果是由于缺乏控制各国人均GDP未观测决定因素的国家固定效应所驱动的。我们从理论和实证上表明，未能纳入国家固定效应会导致趋同系数向零产生偏差，并且这种偏差可能随时间变化，即使潜在的国家层面参数是稳定的。这些结果不仅与当前论文相关，而且更普遍地与趋同文献相关。我们的重新分析没有发现趋同模式发生重大变化的证据，更重要的是，没有发现制度变量与经济增长之间关系扁平化的证据。聚焦于民主，我们表明该变量的影响仍然被精确估计，并且如果有什么不同的话，它比样本初期的影响还要大一些。

28991.title: Skills, Degrees and Labor Market Inequality
28991.zh_title: 技能、学位与劳动力市场不平等
28991.authors: Peter Q. Blair, Papia Debroy, Justin Heck
28991.abstract: Income inequality between workers with and without bachelor’s degrees has grown sharply during the past 50 years. Canonical explanations attribute this trend to skill-biased technological change, often labeling workers with bachelor’s degrees as “skilled” and those without as “unskilled.” We offer a complementary approach by using the skill requirements of a worker’s current job as a proxy for their skill set. This method enables skill-based comparisons across educational backgrounds and ties observed skills directly to labor market demand. It also broadens the definition of a skilled worker to include those who develop expertise through work experience. We refer to such workers as Skilled Through Alternative Routes (STARs), consistent with the idea that human capital is accumulated not only through formal education but also through on-the-job work experience. Building on this framework, we develop a model of job transitions in which the Absolute Skill Mobility Friction (ASMF) is defined as the elasticity of the flow rate between two occupations with respect to skill distance separating them. Empirically, we find that STARs and bachelor’s degree holders experience similar mobility frictions when moving between jobs with comparable skill requirements. However, STARs face greater friction than bachelor’s degree holders when moving to higher-wage jobs that demand more skills than their current occupation. This gap in upward mobility persists unmitigated in tight labor markets, suggesting that human capital differences alone do not account for labor market inequality by education.
28991.zh_abstract: 在过去50年中，拥有学士学位和没有学士学位的工人之间的收入不平等急剧扩大。经典解释将其归因于技能偏向型技术进步，通常将有学士学位的工人标记为“高技能”，而没有的则标记为“低技能”。我们提供了一种补充方法，即使用工人当前工作的技能要求作为其技能集的代理。这种方法能够基于技能进行跨教育背景的比较，并将观察到的技能直接与劳动力市场需求联系起来。它还拓宽了高技能工人的定义，将那些通过工作经验发展专业技能的人也包括在内。我们将此类工人称为“通过替代途径获得技能者”（STARs），这与人力资本不仅通过正规教育积累，也通过在职工作经验积累的观点一致。基于这一框架，我们开发了一个工作转换模型，其中“绝对技能流动性摩擦”（ASMF）被定义为两个职业之间流动率相对于它们之间技能距离的弹性。实证上，我们发现，当在技能要求相似的工作之间转换时，STARs和学士学位持有者经历相似的流动性摩擦。然而，当STARs转向比他们当前职业要求更多技能的高工资工作时，他们面临的摩擦比学士学位持有者更大。这种向上流动性的差距在紧张的劳动力市场中仍未得到缓解，这表明仅凭人力资本差异并不能解释按教育划分的劳动力市场不平等。
28991.meta: Programs：DAE, ED, LS, PR；JEL：I24, I26, J01, J1, J2, J24, J3, J6, L2

28990.title: Innovation-Driven Entrepreneurship
28990.authors: Tristan L. Botelho, Daniel Fehder, Yael Hochberg
28990.abstract: Entrepreneurship is thought to be a key driver of economic growth. While there are myriad forms of entrepreneurship, ranging from self-employment to small and medium size enterprises to technology- and innovation-driven startups, recent research provides evidence that the relationship between entrepreneurship and economic growth is driven not by overall quantity of new firm entry, but rather by a small subset of high-growth startups that are primarily categorized as innovation-driven. This paper provides a survey of the growing literature on the economics of such innovation-driven entrepreneurship. We begin by distinguishing between the various forms of entrepreneurship, which are often confounded in both theory and empirical work. We lay out the current state of knowledge, and describe the challenges faced by researchers in the field, particularly around measurement, data and identification. We conclude with an overview of the major open questions and directions for future research in the area.
28990.zh_abstract: 创业被认为是经济增长的关键驱动力。尽管创业形式多种多样，从自雇到中小企业，再到技术和创新驱动的初创企业，但最近的研究提供的证据表明，创业与经济增长之间的关系并非由新企业进入的总量驱动，而是由一小部分主要被归类为创新驱动的高增长初创企业所驱动。本文对关于此类创新驱动创业的日益增长的文献进行了综述。我们首先区分了各种形式的创业，这些形式在理论和实证工作中常常被混淆。我们阐述了当前的知识状况，并描述了该领域研究人员面临的挑战，特别是在测量、数据和识别方面。最后，我们概述了该领域的主要未解决问题和未来研究方向。

28989.title: The Welfare Effects of Dynamic Pricing: Evidence from Airline Markets
28989.zh_title: 动态定价的福利效应：来自航空市场的证据
28989.abstract: Airfares fluctuate due to demand shocks and intertemporal variation in willingness to pay. I estimate a model of dynamic airline pricing accounting for both sources of price adjustments using novel flight-level data. I use the model estimates to evaluate the welfare effects of dynamic airline pricing. Relative to uniform pricing, dynamic pricing benefits early-arriving, leisure consumers at the expense of late-arriving, business travelers. Although dynamic pricing ensures seat availability for business travelers, these consumers are then charged higher prices. When aggregated over markets, welfare is higher under dynamic pricing than under uniform pricing. The directionality of the welfare effect at the market level depends on whether dynamic price adjustments are mainly driven by demand shocks or by changes in the overall demand elasticity.
28989.zh_abstract: 机票价格因需求冲击和支付意愿的跨期变化而波动。我利用新颖的航班层面数据，估计了一个考虑这两种价格调整来源的动态航空公司定价模型。我利用模型估计来评估动态航空公司定价的福利效应。相对于统一定价，动态定价有利于早到的休闲消费者，但代价是晚到的商务旅客。尽管动态定价确保了商务旅客的座位可用性，但这些消费者随后被收取更高的价格。当跨市场加总时，动态定价下的福利高于统一定价下的福利。市场层面福利效应的方向取决于动态价格调整主要是由需求冲击驱动，还是由整体需求弹性的变化驱动。

28988.title: Rents and Intangible Capital: A Q+ Framework
28988.zh_title: 租金与无形资本：一个Q+框架
28988.abstract: In recent years, US investment has been lackluster, despite rising valuations. Key explanations include growing rents and growing intangibles. We propose and estimate a framework to quantify their roles. The gap between valuations — reflected in average Q — and investment — reflected in marginal q — can be decomposed into three terms: the value of installed intangibles; rents generated by physical capital; and an interaction term, measuring rents generated by intangibles. The intangible-related terms contribute significantly to the gap, particularly in fast-growing sectors. Our findings suggest care in a pure-rents interpretation, given the rising role of intangibles.
28988.zh_abstract: 近年来，尽管估值上升，但美国投资一直低迷。关键解释包括租金增长和无形资产增长。我们提出并估计了一个框架来量化它们的作用。估值（反映在平均Q中）与投资（反映在边际q中）之间的差距可以分解为三个部分：已安装无形资产的价值；实物资本产生的租金；以及一个交互项，衡量无形资产产生的租金。与无形资产相关的部分对差距贡献显著，尤其是在快速增长部门。我们的发现表明，鉴于无形资产作用日益上升，在纯粹的租金解释中需要谨慎。
28988.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG；JEL：D25, D4, E22, G31

28987.title: The Causal Effect of Heat on Violence: Social Implications of Unmitigated Heat Among the Incarcerated
28987.zh_title: 高温对暴力的因果效应：被监禁者中未缓解高温的社会影响
28987.abstract: Correctional facilities commonly lack climate control, producing a setting absent endogenous responses to hot weather like avoidance, adjustment, and mitigation. We study daily weather variation across the state of Mississippi, and show that high temperatures increase intense violence among the incarcerated. Days with unsafe heat index levels shift both the intensive and extensive margins of violence, raising daily violent interactions by 20%, and the probability of any violence by 18%. Our setting cleanly identifies the effect of heat on violence, and highlights previously unobserved social costs of current facility infrastructure. Rising global temperatures could substantially increase violence absent adjustment.
28987.zh_abstract: 惩教设施通常缺乏气候控制，造成了一种缺乏对炎热天气内生反应（如回避、调整和缓解）的环境。我们研究了密西西比州全境的每日天气变化，并表明高温会增加被监禁者中的严重暴力行为。具有不安全热指数指数的天数既改变了暴力的集约边际也改变了广延边际，使每日暴力互动增加了20%，任何暴力发生的概率增加了18%。我们的设定清晰地识别了高温对暴力的影响，并突显了当前设施基础设施先前未被观察到的社会成本。如果不进行调整，全球气温上升可能会大幅增加暴力。

28986.title: Entry and Exit of Informal Firms and Development
28986.zh_title: 非正规企业的进入与退出及发展
28986.abstract: Non-farm informal businesses comprise the majority of the firm distribution in developing countries. We document novel stylized facts about entry and exit of informal, non-farm firms using nationally representative panel data over 15 years and across regions with varying levels of local economic development in Vietnam. First, we find that informal businesses exhibit rates of entry and exit around 14-18% annually. Entry and exit rates are similar and highly correlated at a point in time, within industries, and within regions. They both decline over time and across space with economic development. Second, although market selection influences which firms survive, entry and exit has little net effect on aggregate (revenue) productivity or hiring of workers outside the household. This owes to overlapping labor productivity of entering and exiting firms and low subsequent productivity growth and hiring among the surviving entrants. Nonetheless, entry and exit are associated with large changes in individual income. Third, the large overlap in revenue of entering and exiting informal businesses and the high correlation between entry and exit rates are related to the education of owners and their economic activities before and after operating an informal business. Informal business owners are less educated on average than wage workers in the formal sector, but more educated than agricultural workers. The transitions in and out of operating an informal business reflect the underlying structure of economic activities of the working age population, with education gaps also playing a role. The most common transition into non-farm businesses is to and from self-employment in agriculture. The likelihood of this transition declines with economic development, highlighting the role of net entry from agriculture into informal non-farm businesses in structural change.
28986.zh_abstract: 非农非正规企业构成了发展中国家企业分布的主体。我们利用越南15年间的全国代表性面板数据，以及不同地方经济发展水平的区域数据，记录了非农非正规企业进入与退出的新颖典型事实。首先，我们发现非正规企业的年进入率和退出率约为14-18%。在某一时点、行业内部以及区域内部，进入率和退出率相似且高度相关。随着经济发展，两者在时间上和空间上都呈下降趋势。其次，尽管市场选择影响了哪些企业能够生存，但进入和退出对总体（收入）生产率或家庭外雇工几乎没有净效应。这是因为进入和退出企业的劳动生产率存在重叠，且存活下来的新进入者后续的生产率增长和雇佣水平较低。尽管如此，进入和退出与个人收入的巨大变化相关。第三，进入和退出的非正规企业在收入上的高度重叠，以及进入率和退出率之间的高度相关性，与所有者的教育水平及其在经营非正规企业前后的经济活动有关。非正规企业所有者的平均教育水平低于正规部门的工资劳动者，但高于农业劳动者。进出非正规企业经营活动的转变反映了劳动年龄人口经济活动的潜在结构，教育差距也起到了一定作用。进入非农企业最常见的转变是往返于农业自雇。这种转变的可能性随着经济发展而下降，凸显了从农业净进入非农非正规企业在结构变迁中的作用。

28985.title: After the Burning: The Economic Effects of the 1921 Tulsa Race Massacre
28985.zh_title: 焚烧之后：1921年塔尔萨种族大屠杀的经济影响
28985.authors: Alex Albright, Jeremy A. Cook, James J. Feigenbaum, Laura Kincaide, Jason Long, Nathan Nunn
28985.abstract: The 1921 Tulsa Race Massacre resulted in the looting, burning, and leveling of thirty-five square blocks of a once-thriving Black neighborhood. We examine the economic consequences of the Massacre for Black Tulsans. We find that in the years and decades that followed, the Massacre led to declines in Black home ownership, occupational status, and child education. The adverse effects of the Massacre on the home ownership of Black Tulsans persisted and actually widened in the second half of the 20th century. Consistent with historical accounts, we also see that, in the years following the Massacre, Black skilled workers were more likely to leave Tulsa. While the compositional effects due to selective migration are too small to explain the direct effects of the Massacre, dynamic growth effects from the loss of entrepreneurial talent may explain part of the longer-term adverse effects of the Massacre. Outside of Tulsa, we find that the Massacre also had detrimental effects on Black communities that were connected to Tulsa through family and kinship networks.
28985.zh_abstract: 1921年的塔尔萨种族大屠杀导致一个曾经繁荣的黑人社区中35个街区被洗劫、焚烧并夷为平地。我们考察了这场大屠杀对塔尔萨黑人的经济后果。我们发现，在随后的数年乃至数十年里，大屠杀导致黑人住房拥有率、职业地位和儿童教育水平下降。大屠杀对塔尔萨黑人住房拥有率的不利影响持续存在，并在20世纪下半叶实际上有所扩大。与历史记载一致，我们还看到，在大屠杀后的几年里，黑人技术工人更有可能离开塔尔萨。虽然选择性迁移带来的构成效应太小，无法解释大屠杀的直接影响，但企业家才能流失带来的动态增长效应可能解释了大屠杀部分长期不利影响。在塔尔萨之外，我们发现大屠杀也对通过家庭和亲属网络与塔尔萨相连的黑人社区产生了不利影响。
28985.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, POL；JEL：J62, J69, N32, N42, N92

28984.title: The Real Effects of Mandatory CSR Disclosure on Emissions: Evidence from the Greenhouse Gas Reporting Program
28984.zh_title: 强制性企业社会责任披露对排放的真实影响：来自温室气体报告计划的证据
28984.authors: Lavender Yang, Nicholas Z. Muller, Pierre Jinghong Liang
28984.abstract: We examine the real effects of the Greenhouse Gas Reporting Program (GHGRP) on electric power plants in the United States. Starting in 2010, the GHGRP requires both the reporting of greenhouse gas emissions by facilities emitting more than 25,000 metric tons of carbon dioxide per year to the Environmental Protection Agency and the public dissemination of the reported data in a comprehensive and accessible manner. Using a difference-in-difference research design, we find that power plants that are subject to the GHGRP reduced carbon dioxide emission rates by 7%. The effect is stronger for plants owned by publicly traded firms. We detect evidence of strategic behavior by firms that own both GHGRP plants and non-GHGRP plants. Such firms strategically reallocate emissions between plants to reduce GHGRP-disclosed emissions. We interpret this as evidence that the program is costly to the affected firms. Our results offer new evidence that public or shareholder pressure is a primary channel through which mandatory Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) reporting programs affect firm behavior.
28984.zh_abstract: 我们考察了美国温室气体报告计划（GHGRP）对火力发电厂的真实影响。自2010年起，GHGRP要求每年二氧化碳排放量超过25,000公吨的设施向环境保护局报告温室气体排放量，并以全面且可访问的方式公开披露所报告的数据。采用双重差分研究设计，我们发现受GHGRP约束的电厂将二氧化碳排放率降低了7%。对于上市公司拥有的电厂，这种效应更强。我们发现了同时拥有GHGRP电厂和非GHGRP电厂的企业存在策略性行为的证据。这些企业在电厂之间策略性地重新分配排放量，以减少GHGRP披露的排放量。我们将此解读为该项目对受影响企业而言成本高昂的证据。我们的结果提供了新的证据，表明公众或股东压力是强制性企业社会责任（CSR）报告项目影响企业行为的主要渠道。

28983.title: Monetary Policy Risk: Rules vs. Discretion
28983.zh_title: 货币政策风险：规则与相机抉择
28983.authors: David Backus, Mikhail Chernov, Stanley E. Zin, Irina Zviadadze
28983.abstract: Long-run asset-pricing restrictions in a macro term-structure model identify discretionary monetary policy separately from a policy rule. We find that policy discretion is an important contributor to aggregate risk. In addition, discretionary easing coincides with good news about the macroeconomy in the form of lower inflation, higher output growth, and lower risk premiums on short-term nominal bonds. However, it also coincides with bad news about long-term financial conditions in the form of higher risk premiums on long-term nominal bonds. Shocks to the rule correlate with changes in the yield curve’s level. Shocks to discretion correlate with changes in its slope.
28983.zh_abstract: 宏观期限结构模型中的长期资产定价约束将相机抉择的货币政策与政策规则区分开来。我们发现政策相机抉择是总体风险的一个重要贡献因素。此外，相机抉择的宽松政策伴随着宏观经济方面的好消息，表现为更低的通胀、更高的产出增长以及更低的短期名义债券风险溢价。然而，它也伴随着长期金融状况方面的坏消息，表现为更高的长期名义债券风险溢价。规则冲击与收益率曲线水平的变化相关。相机抉择冲击与其斜率的变化相关。

28982.title: Why Are Some Recoveries Short and Others Long?
28982.zh_title: 为什么有些复苏短暂而另一些则漫长？
28982.abstract: Using the recession recovery point equal to the month when private payrolls first exceeded their previous peak level, this paper argues that it was the negative secular trend in manufacturing jobs that was the most important determinant of the length and depth of the last three recessions/recoveries. This negative secular trend changed the layoff/recall pattern of jobs in manufacturing into permanent displacements, a malady that lengthened the recovery periods and that is not the explicit target of either traditional monetary policy or traditional fiscal policy. Using the ideas gathered from an examination of the US two-digit sectoral data for the US overall, attention turns to the recession/recoveries of the 50 US states in the last three national recession periods. Regressions that explain the lengths and depths of the recessions in 50 US states reveal the importance of construction jobs, but the most important predictor was manufacturing jobs: the greater the share of manufacturing jobs prior to the recession, the worse was the recession/recovery.
28982.zh_abstract: 以私人就业人数首次超过此前峰值水平的月份作为衰退复苏点，本文认为，制造业就业的负向长期趋势是决定最近三次衰退/复苏长度和深度的最重要因素。这种负向长期趋势将制造业的临时解雇/召回模式转变为永久性失业，这一弊病延长了复苏期，并且不是传统货币政策或传统财政政策的明确目标。利用对美国整体两位数行业数据的研究所得出的观点，我们将注意力转向美国50个州在最近三次全国性衰退期间的衰退/复苏情况。解释美国50个州衰退长度和深度的回归分析揭示了建筑业就业的重要性，但最重要的预测因素是制造业就业：衰退前制造业就业份额越大，衰退/复苏就越严重。

28981.title: Exploiting Symmetry in High-Dimensional Dynamic Programming
28981.zh_title: 在高维动态规划中利用对称性
28981.authors: Mahdi Ebrahimi Kahou, Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Jesse Perla, Arnav Sood
28981.abstract: We propose a new method for solving high-dimensional dynamic programming problems and recursive competitive equilibria with a large (but finite) number of heterogeneous agents using deep learning. We avoid the curse of dimensionality thanks to three complementary techniques: (1) exploiting symmetry in the approximate law of motion and the value function; (2) constructing a concentration of measure to calculate high-dimensional expectations using a single Monte Carlo draw from the distribution of idiosyncratic shocks; and (3) designing and training deep learning architectures that exploit symmetry and concentration of measure. As an application, we find a global solution of a multi-firm version of the classic Lucas and Prescott (1971) model of investment under uncertainty. First, we compare the solution against a linear-quadratic Gaussian version for validation and benchmarking. Next, we solve the nonlinear version where no accurate or closed-form solution exists. Finally, we describe how our approach applies to a large class of models in economics.
28981.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新方法，利用深度学习求解具有大量（但有限）异质性主体的高维动态规划问题和递归竞争均衡。我们通过三种互补技术避免了维度诅咒：（1）利用近似运动规律和价值函数中的对称性；（2）构建测度集中，利用来自异质性冲击分布的单次蒙特卡洛抽样计算高维期望；（3）设计和训练利用对称性和测度集中的深度学习架构。作为一个应用，我们找到了经典Lucas和Prescott（1971）不确定性下投资模型的多企业版本的全局解。首先，我们将解与线性二次高斯版本进行比较以进行验证和基准测试。接下来，我们求解不存在精确或封闭形式解的非线性版本。最后，我们描述了我们的方法如何应用于经济学中的一大类模型。

28980.title: Financial Innovation in the 21st Century: Evidence from U.S. Patents
28980.zh_title: 21世纪的金融创新：来自美国专利的证据
28980.authors: Josh Lerner, Amit Seru, Nick Short, Yuan Sun
28980.abstract: We explore the evolution of financial innovation, using 24,000 U.S. finance patents applied for and granted over last two decades. Patented financial innovations are substantial and economically important, with annual grants expanding from a few dozen in the 1990s to over 2000 in the 2010s. The subject matter of financial patents has changed, consistent with the industry’s shift towards household investors and borrowers. The surge in financial patenting was driven by information technology and other non-financial firms. The location of innovation has shifted, with banks moving activity away from states with tight financial regulation. Concurrently, high-tech regions have attracted financial innovation by payments, IT, and other non-financial firms. Analyses of the returns to financial patents suggests that the social value of these innovations are higher than their private value. We present a simple model to explain these trends. The changing dynamics of financial innovation that began in the 1980s and 1990s may have lowered the private returns to innovation and increased the desirability of patent protection for financial innovations. Regulation of banks following the financial crisis of 2007 may have raised the costs of innovation, leading them to invest less in such activity.
28980.zh_abstract: 我们利用过去二十年中申请并获批的24,000项美国金融专利，探讨了金融创新的演变。获得专利的金融创新是实质性的且具有重要的经济意义，年度授权量从1990年代的几十项扩展到2010年代的2000多项。金融专利的主题已经发生变化，与行业向家庭投资者和借款人的转变相一致。金融专利数量的激增是由信息技术和其他非金融公司推动的。创新的地点已经转移，银行将活动从金融监管严格的州转移出去。与此同时，高科技地区吸引了支付、IT和其他非金融公司的金融创新。对金融专利回报的分析表明，这些创新的社会价值高于其私人价值。我们提出了一个简单的模型来解释这些趋势。始于1980年代和1990年代的金融创新动态变化可能降低了创新的私人回报，并增加了对金融创新专利保护的渴望。2007年金融危机后对银行的监管可能提高了创新成本，导致它们在此类活动上的投资减少。

28979.title: Long-term effects of the Inca Road
28979.authors: Ana Paula Franco, Sebastian Galiani, Pablo Lavado
28979.abstract: The Inca Empire was the last of a long series of highly developed cultures in pre-colonial South America. It stretched across parts of the current territories of Argentina, Bolivia, Chile, Colombia, Ecuador and the whole of Peru. The Inca Road was its 30,000-kilometer-long transportation system. The aim of this study is to identify its long-term impact on current development in Peru. Our results show that the long run effect of the Inca Road includes increases in wages and educational attainment, a reduction of child malnutrition and an increase in children’s mathematics test scores. We also find that these effects are around 20% greater for women and explore the mechanisms that may account for this pattern.
28979.zh_abstract: 印加帝国是前殖民时期南美洲一系列高度发达文化中的最后一个。它横跨现今阿根廷、玻利维亚、智利、哥伦比亚、厄瓜多尔的部分领土以及整个秘鲁。印加古道是其长达30,000公里的运输系统。本研究旨在识别其对秘鲁当前发展的长期影响。我们的结果表明，印加古道的长期效应包括提高工资和教育程度、减少儿童营养不良以及提高儿童数学测试成绩。我们还发现，这些效应对女性而言大约高出20%，并探讨了可能解释这一模式的机制。

28978.title: The Impact of Increased Access to Telemedicine
28978.zh_title: 远程医疗可及性增加的影响
28978.authors: Dan Zeltzer, Liran Einav, Joseph Rashba, Ran D. Balicer
28978.abstract: We estimate the impact of increased access to telemedicine that followed widespread adoption during the March-April 2020 lockdown period in Israel (due to COVID-19). We focus on the post-lockdown period, which in Israel was characterized by a temporary return to normalcy. Prior to the lockdown, telemedicine accounted for about 5% of all primary care visits. It peaked at around 40% during the lockdown, and remained high, at around 20%, during the post-lockdown period. Using a difference-in-differences framework, we compare primary care episodes before and after the lockdown between patients with high and low access to telemedicine, with access defined based on their main primary care physician’s propensity to adopt telemedicine during the lockdown. Increased access to telemedicine results in a 3.5% increase in primary care visits, but a 5% lower per-episode cost, so overall resource utilization is slightly lower. We find that remote visits involve slightly fewer prescriptions and more follow-ups, mainly with the same physician, which is consistent with a prolonged diagnostic path in the absence of physical examination. However, analyzing specific conditions, we find no evidence of missed diagnoses or adverse outcomes. Taken together, our findings suggest that the increased convenience of telemedicine does not compromise care quality or raise costs.
28978.zh_abstract: 我们估算了2020年3月至4月以色列因COVID-19封锁期间远程医疗广泛采用后，其可及性增加所带来的影响。我们重点关注封锁后时期，该时期在以色列的特点是暂时恢复正常状态。封锁前，远程医疗约占所有初级保健就诊的5%。封锁期间，这一比例达到约40%的峰值，并在封锁后时期仍保持在约20%的高位。利用双重差分框架，我们比较了封锁前后，远程医疗可及性高和低的患者之间的初级保健就诊情况，其中可及性是根据其主要初级保健医生在封锁期间采用远程医疗的倾向来定义的。远程医疗可及性的增加导致初级保健就诊次数增加3.5%，但每次就诊成本降低5%，因此总体资源利用率略有下降。我们发现，远程就诊涉及的处方略少，但随访更多，且主要与同一位医生进行，这与缺乏体检情况下诊断路径延长的情况一致。然而，针对特定病症的分析并未发现漏诊或不良后果的证据。综合来看，我们的研究结果表明，远程医疗便利性的提高并不会损害护理质量或增加成本。
28978.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE, PR；JEL：I11, O33

28977.title: Infrastructure Investment and Labor Monopsony Power
28977.zh_title: 基础设施投资与劳动力市场买方垄断势力
28977.authors: Wyatt Brooks, Joseph P. Kaboski, Illenin O. Kondo, Yao Amber Li, Wei Qian
28977.abstract: In this paper we study whether or not transportation infrastructure disrupts local monopsony power in labor markets using an expansion of the national highway system in India. Using panel data on manufacturing firms, we find that monopsony power in labor markets is reduced among firms near newly constructed highways relative to firms that remain far from highways. We estimate that the highways reduce labor markdowns significantly. We use changes in the composition of inputs to identify these effects separately from the reduction of output markups that occurs simultaneously. The impacts of highway construction are therefore pro-competitive in both output and input markets, and act to increase the share of income that labor receives by 1.8--2.3 percentage points.
28977.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们利用印度国家公路系统的扩建，研究交通基础设施是否破坏了劳动力市场中的地方买方垄断势力。利用制造业企业的面板数据，我们发现，与远离新建公路的企业相比，靠近新建公路的企业在劳动力市场中的买方垄断势力有所减弱。我们估计，公路显著降低了劳动力加价幅度。我们利用投入构成的变化，将这些效应与同时发生的产出加价幅度降低区分开来。因此，公路建设在产出市场和投入市场都具有促进竞争的作用，并使劳动收入份额提高1.8至2.3个百分点。
28977.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, LS；JEL：J0, J42, O1, O18

28976.title: Teaching and Incentives: Substitutes or Complements?
28976.zh_title: 教学与激励：替代品还是互补品？
28976.authors: James Allen IV, Arlete Mahumane, James Riddell IV, Tanya Rosenblat, Dean Yang, Hang Yu
28976.abstract: Interventions to promote learning are often categorized into supply- and demand-side approaches. In a randomized experiment to promote learning about COVID-19 among Mozambican adults, we study the interaction between a supply and a demand intervention, respectively: teaching via targeted feedback, and providing financial incentives to learners. In theory, teaching and learner-incentives may be substitutes (crowding out one another) or complements (enhancing one another). Experts surveyed in advance predicted a high degree of substitutability between the two treatments. In contrast, we find substantially more complementarity than experts predicted. Combining teaching and incentive treatments raises COVID-19 knowledge test scores by 0.5 standard deviations, though the standalone teaching treatment is the most cost-effective. The complementarity between teaching and incentives persists in the longer run, over nine months post-treatment.
28976.zh_abstract: 促进学习的干预措施通常被分为供给侧和需求侧两类。在一项旨在促进莫桑比克成年人了解COVID-19的随机实验中，我们分别研究了一种供给侧干预和一种需求侧干预之间的相互作用：通过针对性反馈进行教学，以及为学习者提供经济激励。理论上，教学和学习者激励可能是替代品（相互挤出）或互补品（相互增强）。事先接受调查的专家预测这两种处理方式之间存在高度的替代性。相反，我们发现互补性远高于专家的预测。将教学和激励处理相结合，可将COVID-19知识测试分数提高0.5个标准差，尽管单独的教学处理最具成本效益。教学与激励之间的互补性在治疗后九个月的长期内仍然存在。
